housework.translation: 現在不止要男女薪金平等，而且還要平均分配家務。

units.text: As soon as we are born, the world gets to work on us and transforms us from merely biological into social units.

biological.text: As soon as we are born, the world gets to work on us and transforms us from merely biological into social units.

calculation.translation: 根據我的估計，她現在應該在印度了。

industrious.text: He is an industrious student to the best of my knowledge.

tender.text: My father was no less affectionate and tender to me than my mother was.

refuge.text: My room is an inviolable refuge.

decent.text: Please keep your language decent while my parents are here.

stubborn.text: I have never come across such a stubborn person.

treatment.text: I'm not accustomed to such treatment.

mend.text: I want to mend this watch.

draft.text: I am writing a draft of the speech.

ignorant.text: I am quite ignorant of the plan.

mommy.text: I gave it to my mommy.

receiver.text: I put the receiver to my ear.

lyric.text: I like lyric better than epic.

epic.text: I like lyric better than epic.
epic.translation: 我喜歡抒情詩多於史詩。

hopeful.text: I feel hopeful about the future.

religious.text: I'm a deeply religious man and believe in life after death.

violently.text: I felt my heart beating violently.

spectacle.text: I need to buy new spectacle frames.

fountain.text: I have lost my new fountain pen.

bent.text: I bent over to pick up my pen which had fallen on the floor.

raised.text: I was born and raised in Tokyo.

authors.text: I have read many modern authors.

literature.text: I majored in American literature at college.
literature.translation: 我在大學主修美國文學。

monotonous.text: I am tired of my monotonous life.
monotonous.translation: 我厌倦了现在单调的生活。

replied.text: He replied that he did not know.

sweep.text: I made him sweep the floor.

cigar.text: I watched a ring of smoke that floated from his cigar into the air.
cigar.translation: 我看著一輪煙圈從他的雪茄裏冒出來，飄到了空氣中。

arrogance.text: I cannot put up with his arrogance.

refusal.text: I interpreted her silence as a refusal.
refusal.translation: 我認為她的沉默就是表示拒絕。

annual.text: I don't know my father's annual income.
annual.translation: 我不知到我爸的年收入是多少。

attach.text: I forgot to attach a stamp to the envelope.
attach.translation: 我忘记在信封上贴邮票了。

elementary.text: I went to elementary school in Nagoya.

maps.text: I made use of the maps during my journey.

nitrogen.text: The air we breathe consists of oxygen and nitrogen.
nitrogen.translation: 我们呼吸的空气是由氧气和氮气组成的。

breathe.text: The air we breathe consists of oxygen and nitrogen.
breathe.translation: 我们呼吸的空气是由氧气和氮气组成的。

remote.text: We sat talking about the remote past.
remote.translation: 我们坐着谈很久以前的事。

crops.text: We grow a variety of crops.

turner.text: We have a high regard for Professor Turner.
turner.translation: 我们十分尊重特纳教授。

range.text: We discussed a wide range of topics.
range.translation: 我们谈论了各种各样的话题。

topics.text: We discussed a wide range of topics.
topics.translation: 我们谈论了各种各样的话题。

modify.text: We want to modify the regulations of our school.
modify.translation: 我们想修改学校的规章制度。

regulations.text: We want to modify the regulations of our school.
regulations.translation: 我们想修改学校的规章制度。

eloquent.text: We were deeply impressed by the lecturer's eloquent speech.
eloquent.translation: 演讲者精彩的演说给我们留下了深刻的印象。

dawn.text: We got up at dawn to avoid a traffic jam.
dawn.translation: 我们黎明时起床以避开交通堵塞。

eager.text: When we are told not to come, we become all the more eager to go.
eager.translation: 让我们别来，我们就更想来了。

ultraviolet.text: Ultraviolet rays can cause skin cancer.

rays.text: Ultraviolet rays can cause skin cancer.

failing.text: Failing the examination means waiting for another year.
failing.translation: 考试不及格意味着再等待一年。

appearing.text: She stopped appearing in public after her accident.

shortly.text: Shortly after the accident, the police came.
shortly.translation: 事故發生後不久，警察來了。

cheer.text: The situation is improving, so cheer up!
cheer.translation: 情況正在改善，所以振作起來！

sketch.text: Jiro made a sketch of Mt. Fuji.

compass.text: Compass needles point to the north.

horn.text: This may sound like blowing my own horn, but ...

racing.text: The bicycle is racing to finish.

gate.text: The car is waiting at the gate.

happening.text: As you look at your face, you try to figure out what is happening behind it, in your mind.

showing.text: Showing your real feelings is not considered a virtue in Japan.

enormous.text: Compiling a dictionary demands an enormous amount of time.
enormous.translation: 編字典是一項極花時間的工作。

attribute.text: It's not fair to attribute your failure to your parents.
attribute.translation: 把你的失败归咎于你的父母是不对的。

misfortune.text: What greater misfortune is there than to go blind?

motive.text: Jealousy was the motive for the murder.

improvement.text: Actually, the present method has plenty of room for improvement.
improvement.translation: 其實現時的方法還有很大的改善空間。

latter.text: Practice is as important as theory, but we are apt to value the latter and despise the former.
latter.translation: 实践和理论同样重要，但我们倾向于重视后者而忽略前者。

insufficient.text: There is insufficient light to take pictures.

melting.text: The area around the melting ice cream was crawling with ants.

vary.text: Social customs vary from country to country.

backward.text: Social conditions are going backward rather than forward.
backward.translation: 社會不是在進步，而是在退步。

muddy.text: The passing car splashed muddy water on me.
muddy.translation: 車子經過的時候把泥水濺到了我的身上。

terrific.text: A car went by at terrific speed.

exhaust.text: Car exhaust causes serious pollution in towns.

buckle.text: It's the law: always buckle your safety belt in cars and airplanes.
buckle.translation: 法律規定，在車輛和飛機上，一定要扣上安全帶。

workshop.text: I adapted the garage for use as a workshop.
workshop.translation: 我把车库改造成工作室使用。

adapted.text: I adapted the garage for use as a workshop.
adapted.translation: 我把车库改造成工作室使用。

wheel.text: The wheel began to roll slowly.

enrich.text: You should enrich your mind when young.
enrich.translation: 年轻的时候你应该开拓你的思想。

propose.text: The young man decided to propose to her.

palm.text: I am interested in palm reading.
palm.translation: 我对掌上阅读很感兴趣。

magic.text: Magic plays an important part in primitive society.
magic.translation: 巫術在原始社會扮演重要角色。

primitive.text: Magic plays an important part in primitive society.
primitive.translation: 巫術在原始社會扮演重要角色。

dioxide.text: Trees give off oxygen and absorb carbon dioxide.
dioxide.translation: 树木排出氧气，吸收二氧化碳。

carbon.text: Trees give off oxygen and absorb carbon dioxide.
carbon.translation: 树木排出氧气，吸收二氧化碳。

relationship.text: There is close relationship between supply and demand.
relationship.translation: 供應和需求之間的關係十分密切。

mechanic.translation: 這名技師組裝了這台引擎。

housing.text: The government is not doing its best to solve the housing problem.
housing.translation: 政府没有尽他们最大的努力去处理住房问题。

initial.text: Your initial order is subject to a special discount of 5%.
initial.translation: 首次訂購可獲九五折的特別優惠。

gymnastics.translation: 我起初覺得廣播體操很無聊，但是現在卻喜歡上了。

refreshing.text: A glass of cold water is very refreshing in hot weather.

obligation.text: It is our obligation to help.

commonly.text: Women commonly live longer than men.

disguise.text: Can't you just picture Ed in woman's disguise?
disguise.translation: 想像一下 Ed 男扮女裝之後會變成甚麼樣子。

ed.text: Can't you just picture Ed in woman's disguise?
ed.translation: 想像一下 Ed 男扮女裝之後會變成甚麼樣子。

winner.text: It is good to be a winner.

reflection.text: A little reflection will show you that you are wrong.
reflection.translation: 只要你細心想一想，就會明白自己的錯處了。

awkward.translation: 這個女孩做了一把很難使用的弓。

hospitality.text: All the guests were touched by her hospitality.
hospitality.translation: 所有的客人都被她的好客感动了。

eraser.translation: 用你的橡皮把這些字擦掉。

aboard.text: The passengers all went aboard the ship.

parent.text: A parent or teacher should bring home to children the pleasure of reading.

retreat.text: I was uncertain whether to advance or to retreat.

uncertain.translation: 我不确定该前进还是后退。

eliminate.text: If mankind doesn't take care of the environment, the environment may eliminate mankind.

diagram.text: Let me explain it with a diagram.

formula.text: The chemical formula for water is H-O-H.

atom.text: A water molecule has two hydrogen atoms and one oxygen atom.
atom.translation: 一個水分子是由兩個氫原子和一個氧原子組成的。

atoms.text: A water molecule has two hydrogen atoms and one oxygen atom.
atoms.translation: 一個水分子是由兩個氫原子和一個氧原子組成的。

molecule.text: A water molecule has two hydrogen atoms and one oxygen atom.
molecule.translation: 一個水分子是由兩個氫原子和一個氧原子組成的。

wednesday.text: We have no classes on Wednesday afternoons.

sciences.text: Mathematics is basic to all sciences.

tends.text: The world's population tends to increase.

thrive.translation: 會成功的男人必須請求妻子讓他離開出外打拼。

circles.text: Money counts for much in political circles.

awareness.translation: 培养政治意识要花费时间。

firms.text: The government will provide interest-free loans to firms that participate in the program.
firms.translation: 政府将会对参与该项计划的企业提供无息贷款。

honesty.text: Honesty was the most important factor in his success.

arrangement.text: Flower arrangement is a part of Japanese culture.
arrangement.translation: 花道是日本文化的一部分。

adore.text: The students adore the new English teacher.

moral.text: This school sets high moral standards for pupils.
moral.translation: 这个学校对学生的道德标准要求很高。

holy.text: The man on whom you see the Spirit come down and remain is he who will baptize with the Holy Spirit.
holy.translation: 你如果看見聖靈降下，落在誰身上，誰就是用聖靈替人施洗的了。

lid.text: The date of manufacture is shown on the lid.

playground.text: A group of young men are playing handball in the playground.
playground.translation: 一群年輕人在操場上打手球。

formerly.text: Formerly people did not know that the earth is round and that it moves around the sun.
formerly.translation: 以前的人不知道地球是圓的，也不知道地球是繞著太陽轉的。

navigation.text: Early explorers used the stars for navigation.

pine.text: There used to be a big pine tree in front of my house.
pine.translation: 以前我家前面有棵大松树。

signals.text: Back then, people communicated using smoke signals.
signals.translation: 以前人们用烟作为联络信号。

indicated.text: The red flag indicated the presence of danger.

globe.text: The equator divides the globe into two hemispheres.
globe.translation: 赤道把地球分为两个半球。

consecutive.text: It snowed for ten consecutive days.

swear.text: I swear I will never do such a thing.
swear.translation: 我發誓我不會做這種事。

aid.text: Doctor, please give this child first aid.

pointed.text: The teacher pointed out your mistakes.

urge.text: Advertisements urge us to buy luxuries.
urge.translation: 廣告慫恿我們買奢侈品。

panel.text: A panel of experts discussed the plan.

experts.text: A panel of experts discussed the plan.

wars.text: I feel sad when I think about all the people who die in wars.
wars.translation: 我一想到那些在戰爭中死去的人，心裏就感到一陣陣的悲痛。

avoided.translation: 戰爭必須不惜一切代價地去避免。

reaching.text: There is no way of reaching the island other than by boat.

identical.text: No two words are identical in meaning.
identical.translation: 每一個字的意思都是獨特的。

attendance.text: Attendance is compulsory for all members.

compulsory.text: Attendance is compulsory for all members.

feudal.text: It is well known that up to the middle of the last century Japan was a feudal state.
feudal.translation: 眾所周知，直到上個世紀中葉日本是一個封建國家。

applaud.text: The whole audience got up and started to applaud.
applaud.translation: 所有的观众都站起来鼓掌。

sending.text: Thank you for sending me a nice card.
sending.translation: 谢谢你寄给我的一张漂亮的卡片。

warehouse.text: Who was it that forgot to lock the door of the warehouse?

shout.text: I heard someone shout outside the window.

thaw.text: The hoarfrost has not begun to thaw yet.

remark.text: The beginning of the trouble was his careless remark.
remark.translation: 麻煩的開頭是他草率的評論。

occasions.text: On gift-giving occasions, people generally avoid giving money, but there are exceptions.
occasions.translation: 人們送禮通常都不會送錢，但是也會有例外的情況。

disabled.text: A sprained ankle disabled him from walking for a month.
disabled.translation: 他把足踝扭傷了，整整一個月不能走路。

ankle.text: A sprained ankle disabled him from walking for a month.
ankle.translation: 他把足踝扭傷了，整整一個月不能走路。

token.text: On leaving school, we presented him with a table clock as a token of our thanks.
token.translation: 我們畢業的時候送了一個桌上時鐘給他作為謝禮。

kilometer.text: It was less than one kilometer to the village post office.
kilometer.translation: 距離村內的郵政局不到一公里。

punishment.text: Many countries have abolished capital punishment.
punishment.translation: 許多國家已經廢除了死刑。

citizens.text: A great number of citizens went into the army.
citizens.translation: 許多老百姓加入了軍隊。

pacific.text: The Pacific is the largest ocean in the world.
pacific.translation: 太平洋是世界上最大的海洋。

boring.text: Sometimes I have to read boring novels.
boring.translation: 有时候，我不得不读一些无聊的小说。

algebra.text: Many pupils are poor at algebra.
algebra.translation: 很多小学生学不好代数。

indian.text: Taiwanese food is milder than Indian food.
indian.translation: 台灣菜比印度菜口味淡。

pillar.text: A large pillar obstructs the view of the lake.
pillar.translation: 巨大的柱子遮住了视线，让人看不到湖。

landlord.text: The landlord says he wants to raise the rent.

tuition.text: I am working to save for my college tuition.
tuition.translation: 我工作是为了攒大学学费。

vocal.text: Public feeling against air pollution has at last become vocal.

threat.text: Air pollution will be a threat to our survival.

embassy.text: The embassy is located next to the Supreme Court.
embassy.translation: 大使馆就在最高法院旁边。

court.text: The embassy is located next to the Supreme Court.
court.translation: 大使馆就在最高法院旁边。

supreme.text: The embassy is located next to the Supreme Court.
supreme.translation: 大使馆就在最高法院旁边。

impulse.text: I felt an impulse to cry out loud.

presently.text: The president is presently in Miami.

reasons.text: I am very sorry that I have to ask you to change the meeting date to March 6 due to personal reasons.
reasons.translation: 真的很對不起，因為一些私人的理由，我想請你把見面日期改為三月六日。

preceding.text: The third quarter GNP growth was 1% over the preceding quarter.
preceding.translation: 第三季國民生產總值較上一季成長了1％。

pat.text: I felt somebody pat me on the shoulder.

summit.text: Who first reached the summit of Mt. Everest?

victim.text: Who would be its next victim?

culprit.text: None of them would admit to being the culprit.
culprit.translation: 他们没有一个人承认自己是犯人。

skeleton.text: The explorers discovered a skeleton in the cave.
skeleton.translation: 探险家们在洞穴里发现了骸骨。

presents.text: You'll get a lot of presents on your birthday.

hail.translation: 我們在槍林彈雨之下行進。

ideal.text: A warm, sunny day is ideal for a picnic.

obtained.text: Knowledge can only be obtained by study.

bowl.text: A bowl of rice is about 180 grams.

calendar.text: In China, they celebrate New Year by the lunar calendar.

hard-working.text: The Chinese are a hard-working people.

businesses.text: Small businesses will have to tighten their belts to survive.

tighten.translation: 中小企业要勒紧裤带才能存活。

faithful.text: The statue of Hachiko, the faithful dog, stands in front of Shibuya Station.

custom.text: It's my custom to go for a walk before breakfast.
custom.translation: 我習慣早餐之前出去散步。

toast.text: I always have coffee and toast for breakfast.

punctuation.text: You must be more careful about spelling and punctuation.
punctuation.translation: 你得要更注意拼字和標點符號。

bait.text: Before he went fishing, he dug up some worms for bait.

secured.text: The bank secured the city from a flood.
secured.translation: 堤坝保护了城市免受洪灾。

refresh.text: Moderate exercise will refresh both mind and body.
refresh.translation: 适度的运动让身心焕然一新。

moderate.text: Moderate exercise will refresh both mind and body.
moderate.translation: 适度的运动让身心焕然一新。

outdoors.text: The party will be held outdoors, weather permitting.
outdoors.translation: 若天氣許可的話，派對將會在戶外舉行。

departure.text: With the weather getting worse, the departure was put off.
departure.translation: 由于天气变差，出发延迟了。

snowy.text: According to the weather forecast, tomorrow will be snowy.
snowy.translation: 天气预报说明天会下雪。

astronomy.text: Astronomy deals with the stars and planets.
astronomy.translation: 天文學涉及恆星和行星。

peaceful.text: Country life is very peaceful in comparison with city life.
peaceful.translation: 和都市生活相比，鄉村生活和諧多了。

telegraph.text: Do you know who invented the telegraph?

generate.text: An electric current can generate magnetism.

trick.text: The phone call was a trick to get him out of the house.
trick.translation: 那通電話是引他離開房子的一個小把戲。

directory.text: May I see the telephone directory?

annoyed.text: He was always annoyed in the city by noises of one sort or another.
annoyed.translation: 他在城市里一直受到噪音或者其他的干扰。

icy.text: An icy blast of wind chilled me to the bone.
icy.translation: 冰冷的疾風吹到我骨子裡去了。

blast.text: An icy blast of wind chilled me to the bone.
blast.translation: 冰冷的疾風吹到我骨子裡去了。

chilled.text: An icy blast of wind chilled me to the bone.
chilled.translation: 冰冷的疾風吹到我骨子裡去了。

sunlight.text: The icy road sparkled in the sunlight.
sunlight.translation: 結冰的道路在陽光下閃閃發亮。

accustom.text: You have to accustom yourself to the crowded trains in Tokyo.
accustom.translation: 你要习惯东京拥挤的火车。

dome.text: What's the number for the Tokyo Dome?
dome.translation: 东京巨蛋的电话号码是多少？

oriental.text: I have an interest in oriental ceramics.

starve.text: I would rather starve than steal.

glory.text: The religion was in its glory in those days.
glory.translation: 这个宗教当时处于全盛时期。

lump.text: I bumped my head against the door and got a lump.
lump.translation: 我头撞到了门，肿了一块。

onto.text: It is dangerous to jump onto a moving train.
onto.translation: 跳上一列正在开的火车是很危险的。

dread.text: Why do you think animals dread fire?
dread.translation: 你覺得動物為什麼會怕火呢？

instinct.translation: 動物依靠牠們的本能行動。

flock.text: Birds of a feather flock together.

feather.text: Birds of a feather flock together.

guard.text: When one of my coworkers starts racking up good sales figures I can't let down my guard.
guard.translation: 若同期的人先一步完成銷售目標，我也不能再吊兒郎當了。

metals.text: Copper and silver are both metals.

copper.text: Copper and silver are both metals.

doorway.text: A man suddenly appeared in the doorway.
doorway.translation: 一个男的突然出现在门口。

conscience.text: His conscience suddenly awoke in him.

kettle.text: The pot calls the kettle black.

trim.text: Trim the fat off the meat.

phenomena.text: A rainbow is one of the most beautiful phenomena of nature.
phenomena.translation: 彩虹是自然界最美的现象之一。

highest.text: What mountain do you think is the second highest in Japan?
highest.translation: 你认为日本第二高峰是哪座山？

distinctive.translation: 日本有许多别具一格的特色。

powerful.translation: 日本的军队在当时很强。

tar.text: The Japanese Parliament today officially elected Ryūtarō Hashimoto as the country's 52nd prime minister.
tar.translation: 日本國會今天正式選舉了橋本龍太郎作為全國第52屆總理。

parliament.text: The Japanese Parliament today officially elected Ryūtarō Hashimoto as the country's 52nd prime minister.
parliament.translation: 日本國會今天正式選舉了橋本龍太郎作為全國第52屆總理。

islands.text: Japan consists of four major islands and over 3,000 small islands, and is about equal to California in area.
islands.translation: 日本是由四個大島和三千多個小島組成的，面積和加州差不多。

density.text: Japan has a high population density.

high-tech.text: Japan is a leader in the world's high-tech industry.
high-tech.translation: 日本是世界高科技产业的领头人。

western.text: Japan needed contact with the Western countries.
western.translation: 日本有必要和西方各国接触。

northern.text: Japan is located in the Northern Hemisphere.

hemisphere.text: Japan is located in the Northern Hemisphere.

groups.text: The Japanese like to travel in groups.

foods.text: Do you like to cook Japanese foods?

breast.text: I'd like to have a test for breast cancer.
breast.translation: 我想檢查一下我是否患了乳癌。

weapon.text: Patience is sometimes the most effective weapon.
weapon.translation: 耐心有时候是最有效的武器。

hedge.text: The cat got through the hedge.

fuel.text: There was a shortage of fuel.

agriculture.text: Agriculture consumes a great amount of water.
agriculture.translation: 農業需要消耗大量的水。

farmers.text: Farmers are busy working in the field.
farmers.translation: 农夫们在田地里忙碌地耕种。

devastating.text: A devastating earthquake hit the state capital.
devastating.translation: 一場毀滅性的地震襲擊了這個州的首府。

debate.text: The jury's guilty verdict gave rise to widespread debate.
debate.translation: 陪审团作出的犯罪判决激起了很大的争论。

verdict.text: The jury's guilty verdict gave rise to widespread debate.
verdict.translation: 陪审团作出的犯罪判决激起了很大的争论。

exposition.text: The exposition will be held for six months.

dove.text: There is a white dove on the roof.

chill.text: It's better to chill white wine before you serve it.
chill.translation: 在你侍酒前最好先將白葡萄酒冷卻一下。

uniform.text: The girl in a white uniform took my temperature.
uniform.translation: 有個穿白色制服的女孩幫我量了體溫。

label.text: The contents of the box are listed on the label.
label.translation: 箱子的内容在标签上面写着。

precedent.text: It's totally without precedent for the suspect's attorney to be the true culprit.
precedent.translation: 這前所未聞, 犯罪嫌疑人的律師竟然是真正的罪魁禍首。

attorney.text: It's totally without precedent for the suspect's attorney to be the true culprit.
attorney.translation: 這前所未聞, 犯罪嫌疑人的律師竟然是真正的罪魁禍首。

consequence.text: It is of no consequence to me that he is coming.
consequence.translation: 他要來這件事對我而言無關緊要。

eligible.text: If he were a little younger, he would be eligible for the post.
eligible.translation: 如果他年轻一点，他将很适合这个职位。

homesick.text: He came back not because he was homesick, but because he was running short of money.
homesick.translation: 他不是因為想家，而是因為沒錢才回來的。

owned.text: He acted like he owned the place.
owned.translation: 他把自己当成了这里的主人。

interval.text: There was a long interval before he replied.

item.text: The first item he bought was an alarm clock.
item.translation: 他买的第一项东西是一个闹钟。

attempt.text: He failed in his attempt to swim across the river.
attempt.translation: 他试图游过河，但是失败了。

companion.text: He and his companion asked me to come along with them.
companion.translation: 他和他的伙伴让我跟他们一起去。

humour.text: He has a great sense of humour.

property.text: I entrusted my property to him.
property.translation: 我把我的财产托付给他。

suggests.text: His accent suggests he is a foreigner.
suggests.translation: 他的口音显露出他是外国人。

foreigner.text: His accent suggests he is a foreigner.
foreigner.translation: 他的口音显露出他是外国人。

acting.text: His acting is far from being perfect.

talented.text: His wife is quite a talented woman.

conspicuous.text: The scar on his forehead is conspicuous.
conspicuous.translation: 他額頭上的疤痕很醒目。

dash.text: His record is a new world record in the 100-meter dash.
dash.translation: 他刷新了百米短跑的世界紀錄。

scrap.text: There is not a scrap of truth in his words.
scrap.translation: 他說的話沒有一句是真的。

twin.text: His wife gave birth to twin boys.
twin.translation: 他的妻子生下了一對雙胞胎男孩。

admiration.text: I feel admiration for his talent.

confused.text: I was very confused by his questions.
confused.translation: 我對他的問題感到很困惑。

regime.text: His regime is bound to collapse.

serving.text: His son is serving his sentence.

crocodile.text: His leg was bitten by a crocodile.

consistent.text: His daily behavior is not consistent with his principles.
consistent.translation: 他的日常行为并不和他的原则相一致。

misery.text: His illness caused her great misery.

inches.text: He's three inches taller than I am.

construct.text: After reading his books I feel I can construct a house.
construct.translation: 讀完他的書後，我覺得我可以構建一棟房子。

orders.translation: 我们必须执行他的命令。

execute.translation: 我们必须执行他的命令。

surgeon.text: There are two doctors in his circle of friends, a surgeon and an ophthalmologist.
surgeon.translation: 他的圈子裏有兩人是醫生，一個是外科醫生，另一個是眼科醫生。

garbage.text: He had gone there to help garbage workers strike peacefully for better pay and working conditions.
garbage.translation: 他去了那裏幫助清潔工人和平地爭取更高的薪金和更好的工作環境。

meditate.text: He used to meditate in the morning.
meditate.translation: 他過去時常在早上的時候冥想。

diplomat.text: He is a diplomat at the American Embassy.
diplomat.translation: 他是美国大使馆的外交官。

awarded.text: He's been awarded a gold medal once.

medal.text: He's been awarded a gold medal once.

neat.text: He took a drink of whiskey neat.
neat.translation: 他喝了一杯純威士忌酒。

whiskey.text: He took a drink of whiskey neat.
whiskey.translation: 他喝了一杯純威士忌酒。

thrifty.text: He is thrifty, not to say stingy.
thrifty.translation: 他勤俭节约，甚至是小气的。

van.text: He imitated the works of Van Gogh.

colorado.text: He has a large farm in Colorado.
colorado.translation: 他在科羅拉多州有一個大農場。

bye.text: He departed without so much as saying good bye.
bye.translation: 他連再見也不說就走了。

queer.text: He is really a queer fellow!

surroundings.text: He soon got used to the new surroundings.
surroundings.translation: 他很快就适应了新的环境。

lover.text: He is a lover of sports.

sportsman.text: He looks like a sportsman, but he is a writer.
sportsman.translation: 他看起来像个运动员，但是其实是个作家。

arrow.text: He shot an arrow at the deer.

qualified.text: He is not qualified for the job.

reward.text: He is entitled to receive the reward.

motion.text: They looked relieved only when it was in motion.
motion.translation: 当它运转了，他们才看起来放心了。

imaginative.text: He is a very imaginative writer.
imaginative.translation: 他是非常有想像力的作家。

dried.text: He dried himself with a towel.

tough.text: He won't be easily discouraged, because he's a tough guy.
tough.translation: 他很坚强，不会那么容易灰心。

actors.text: He thinks that only very well trained actors can be really successful.
actors.translation: 他认为只有训练有素的演员才能够获得成功。

romantic.text: He's a very romantic boyfriend who brings me flowers each night.
romantic.translation: 他是箇非常浪漫的男朋友，每晚都給我送花。

thoughtful.text: He is a very thoughtful person.

contrived.text: He contrived a means of speaking to Nancy privately.
contrived.translation: 他用了一些手段来和Nancy私下交谈。

via.text: He went to London via Paris.

cruelty.text: He was treated with great cruelty.

energetic.text: He isn't as energetic as he once was.
energetic.translation: 他不像从前那样精力充沛了。

obviously.text: He can speak French, and obviously English.
obviously.translation: 他能說法語，當然還有英語。

chin.text: He was listening with his chin resting on his hand.

pressed.text: He pressed the button and waited.
pressed.translation: 他按下按鈕然後等待著。

mature.text: He grew a beard to look more mature.
mature.translation: 他留了胡子，为了让自己看起来更成熟。

foggy.text: She slowly disappeared into the foggy forest.
foggy.translation: 她緩緩消失在霧氣瀰漫的森林中。

palate.text: He has a good palate for wine.
palate.translation: 他对鉴品红酒很有一套。

stepped.text: He stepped on my foot on purpose.

destined.text: He was destined to become a great musician.
destined.translation: 他命中注定要成為偉大的音樂家。

determination.text: He made a determination to be a doctor.
determination.translation: 他下定了決心要做醫生。

bullet.text: He was killed by a single bullet.

predicted.text: He predicted there would be rain.

sought.text: He sought shelter from the rain.
sought.translation: 他四處尋找避雨的地方。

command.text: He has a good command of English.

grasp.text: He has a good grasp of English.

aptitude.text: He has a remarkable aptitude for music.

preferred.text: He preferred working to doing nothing.
preferred.translation: 他更愿意工作而不是无所事事。

thrown.text: He got thrown out of the house.

interior.text: He made over the interior of his house.

represented.text: He represented our company at the conference.
represented.translation: 他代表我們公司出席了會議。

steps.text: He went up the steps slowly.
steps.translation: 他一步一步地拾級而上。

jaw.text: He got a broken jaw and lost some teeth.
jaw.translation: 他磕碎了下巴，掉了几颗牙。

unfit.text: He is unfit to be a teacher.

artistic.text: He was raised in an artistic family.

aggressive.translation: 他是个咄咄逼人的的人。

linguistics.text: He is absorbed in the study of linguistics.
linguistics.translation: 他沉迷于语言学的研究。

exposed.text: He deliberately exposed her to danger.

deliberately.text: He deliberately exposed her to danger.

intersection.text: He failed to see the stop sign at the intersection and hit an oncoming car.
intersection.translation: 他沒有看見十字路口的停止標誌，和一輛迎面而來的汽車撞個正著。

funds.text: He was arrested for abusing public funds.
funds.translation: 他因滥用公共基金而被捕。

thrust.text: He thrust some coins into my pocket.
thrust.translation: 他把數枚硬幣強行塞進了我的口袋中。

core.text: He is rotten to the core.

insects.text: He has an interest in collecting insects.
insects.translation: 他對收集昆蟲很有興趣。

guilt.text: His sense of guilt was diminished.

finance.text: He claimed to be an expert in finance.

claimed.text: He claimed to be an expert in finance.

weed.text: He pulled up the weed and threw it away.

dealing.text: He is good at dealing with children.

instructions.text: He gave me precise instructions to do the job.
instructions.translation: 他给我的工作作出了明确指示。

precise.text: He gave me precise instructions to do the job.
precise.translation: 他给我的工作作出了明确指示。

requested.text: He requested me to keep it secret.

pretext.text: He came to my house on the pretext of seeing me.
pretext.translation: 他打着见我的幌子来了我家。

forth.text: He asked me my age, my name, my address, and so forth.
forth.translation: 他問了我的年齡、姓名、地址等等。

included.text: He is included among my friends.

rank.text: He is immediately above me in rank.

annoy.text: He made mistakes on purpose to annoy me.
annoy.translation: 他为了惹恼我故意犯错。

prose.text: He isn't a poet; he's a prose writer.
prose.translation: 他不是诗人；他写的是散文。

illusion.text: He had the illusion that he was a genius.

seventy.text: He lived to be seventy years old.

socialist.text: He claims to be a socialist, and yet he has two houses and a Rolls Royce.
socialist.translation: 他雖然號稱自己是個社會主義者，但是其實他擁有兩套房子還有一輛勞斯萊斯。

handsome.text: He is young and, what is more, handsome.
handsome.translation: 他很年轻，更重要的是，他很帅。

actress.translation: 他和一个女演员结婚了。

aloud.text: He thought to himself, "No!" Aloud he said, "Yes."
aloud.translation: 他心里对自己说“不！”。他大声说出“是。”。

lifestyle.text: He has problems with adapting to lifestyle changes.
lifestyle.translation: 他在適應新的生活方式上有問題。

gifted.text: He is gifted with perfect wisdom.
gifted.translation: 他天生擁有完美的智慧。

broad.text: He had his car stolen in broad daylight.
broad.translation: 他的车子光天化日被偷走了。

daylight.text: He had his car stolen in broad daylight.
daylight.translation: 他的车子光天化日被偷走了。

numbered.text: He is numbered among the greatest scientists in the world.
numbered.translation: 他是世界上最伟大的科学家之一。

enlarge.text: He tried to enlarge his sphere of influence.
enlarge.translation: 他试图扩大自己的势力范围。

innate.text: He has an innate love of adventure.

cheerful.text: He is not the cheerful man he was.
cheerful.translation: 他已經不再是以前那個快樂的男孩了。

boom.text: He amassed a fortune in stock trading during the last boom.
boom.translation: 他在上个景气时期炒股攒下了一笔钱。

promising.text: He is a promising young man.

pause.text: He spoke for ten minutes without a pause.
pause.translation: 他不停顿地说了十分钟。

regardless.text: He says what he thinks regardless of other people's feelings.
regardless.translation: 他說話從來不理別人的感受。

unconscious.text: He was found lying unconscious on the kitchen floor.
unconscious.translation: 他被人发现倒在厨房的地板上，不省人事。

intuition.text: By intuition he knew she was lying.
intuition.translation: 他凭直觉发现她在撒谎。

artists.text: He is one of the greatest artists in Japan.
artists.translation: 他是日本最伟大的艺术家之一。

superficial.text: He has only a superficial knowledge of Japanese.
superficial.translation: 他對日文只是略懂皮毛。

autobiography.text: He devoted the last years of his life to writing his autobiography.

manuscript.text: He showed me the manuscript of his new play.
manuscript.translation: 他给我看了他最新剧的底稿。

welfare.text: He works at the welfare office.

prompt.text: He pressed me for a prompt reply.

unify.text: He tried to unify the various groups.
unify.translation: 他試著統一不同的團體。

brief.text: He gave his reasons in brief.
brief.translation: 他简单地阐述了他的理由。

poster.text: He paused to look at the poster.

anxiety.text: He caused his parents a lot of anxiety.

opposition.text: In the teeth of their strong opposition, we carried out our plan.
opposition.translation: 雖然受到他們的強烈反對，但我們還是實行了我們的計劃。

protest.text: Their small protest triggered a mass demonstration.
protest.translation: 他們小型的示威引發了一場大規模的遊行。

therefore.text: They have a growing population; therefore they need more and more food.
therefore.translation: 那國家的人口正在增長，所以他們需要的食物量也愈來愈大。

edward.translation: 他們的兒子被命名為愛德華。

inn.text: A fire broke out at the inn where they were staying.
inn.translation: 火警發生在他們住的旅館。

insist.text: They will insist on her staying there longer.
insist.translation: 他们会坚持要她逗留久一点。

tear.text: They will tear down the old building in two days.
tear.translation: 他們將在兩天內拆除這棟舊的建築物。

empire.text: They built their empire in Peru about five hundred years ago.
empire.translation: 他们大约五百年前在秘鲁建立了帝国。

unaware.text: They were carelessly unaware of the danger.
unaware.translation: 他们粗心大意，还没意识到危险。

gesture.text: They communicate with each other by gesture.

frequent.text: They make frequent trips to Europe.

spaceship.translation: 他們把太空船命名為 A100。

literal.text: He explained the literal meaning of the sentences.
literal.translation: 他解释了句子的字面意思。

greenhouse.text: They grow strawberries in their greenhouse.
greenhouse.translation: 他們在他們的溫室裡種植草莓。

acquire.text: They sent their son to Europe to acquire culture.
acquire.translation: 他們送他們的兒子到歐洲去學習文化。

seeking.text: They went out to Australia seeking gold.
seeking.translation: 他们为了找到黄金而前往澳大利亚。

damages.text: They sued the government for damages.
damages.translation: 他們狀告政府賠償損失。

lumber.translation: 他们要发送木材给我们。

assassinate.text: They attempted to assassinate the president.

antarctic.text: They went on an expedition to the Antarctic.

crimes.text: They forgave him for his crimes.

director.text: They appointed him as a director.

revenge.text: They set fire to their neighbour's house in revenge.
revenge.translation: 為了報仇，他們放火燒了鄰居的家。

gravity.text: They conducted a series of experiments under zero gravity.
gravity.translation: 他們在無重力狀態下進行了一連串的實驗。

launch.text: They are going to launch an artificial satellite tomorrow.
launch.translation: 明天將要發射一顆人造衛星。

employment.text: They guaranteed regular employment to their workers.
employment.translation: 他們對他們的員工保證就業。

planned.text: I planned to introduce him to Beatrice.

employ.text: His age didn't enter into our decision not to employ him.
employ.translation: 我们决定不录用他时，并没有考虑他的年龄问题。

criticize.text: Few, if any, will criticize him.
criticize.translation: 很少有人会批评他，即使有也不多。

astronaut.text: The man whom she is going to marry is an astronaut.
astronaut.translation: 她的未婚夫是一個太空人。

disc.text: She gave me this compact disc.

efficient.text: There is no denying that she is very efficient.
efficient.translation: 无可否认她非常有能力。

values.translation: 她覺得健康比財富重要。

exaggerate.text: It seems to me that she has a tendency to exaggerate.
exaggerate.translation: 在我看來，她有一種誇張的傾向。

fur.text: Her coat is fur on the inside.
fur.translation: 他/她的大衣內襯是用皮毛做的。

coarse.text: Her dress was made of coarse wool.
coarse.translation: 她的裙子是用粗糙的羊毛造的。

dispense.text: I can dispense with her help.

hopes.translation: 她所抱着的希望完全消失了。

gratitude.translation: 她的心流露著感激之情。

wholly.text: Her words were wholly void of meaning.

void.text: Her words were wholly void of meaning.

covers.text: Her new hairstyle covers her ears.
covers.translation: 她的新髮型遮住了耳朵。

meaningful.text: She gave me a meaningful look.
meaningful.translation: 她意味深長地看了我一眼。

modest.text: After winning the Nobel prize, she remained as modest as ever.
modest.translation: 獲得諾貝爾獎後，她仍謙虛如昔。

mount.text: She is going to Mount Tate.

whisper.text: What did she whisper to you?
whisper.translation: 她跟你說了什麼悄悄話？

plentiful.text: She shed plentiful tears when her beloved dog was killed in an accident.
plentiful.translation: 她目睹愛犬在意外中離世，不禁淚如泉湧。

shed.text: She shed plentiful tears when her beloved dog was killed in an accident.
shed.translation: 她目睹愛犬在意外中離世，不禁淚如泉湧。

beloved.text: She shed plentiful tears when her beloved dog was killed in an accident.
beloved.translation: 她目睹愛犬在意外中離世，不禁淚如泉湧。

stones.translation: 她捡了许多漂亮的小石头。

spider.text: She shrieked whenever she saw a spider.

abhorrent.text: Such an idea is abhorrent to her.

grave.text: She carried that habit to her grave.
grave.translation: 她到死都改不了那個習慣。

radical.text: She has a very radical opinion about the problem.
radical.translation: 她對於這個問題有很激進的意見。

plate.translation: 她把東西吃得一乾二淨。

typist.text: She found employment as a typist.

scores.text: She is not in the least worried about her test scores.
scores.translation: 她完全不擔心測驗的分數。

unhealthy.text: She is quite pretty, but looks unhealthy.
unhealthy.translation: 她佷美， 可是看起來不健康。

elaborate.text: She made elaborate preparations for the party.
elaborate.translation: 她精心籌備了這個派對。

brandy.text: She poured brandy into the glasses.
brandy.translation: 她把白蘭地倒進玻璃杯裡。

sheets.text: She put clean sheets on the bed.
sheets.translation: 她把乾淨的床單鋪在床上。

sigh.text: She gave out a sigh of relief.

manual.text: She was reading a gardening manual.
manual.translation: 她正在讀一本園藝手冊。

wholesome.text: She prepares wholesome meals for her family.
wholesome.translation: 她为她的家人准备健康餐。

schoolgirl.text: She showed me a picture of her mother as a schoolgirl.
schoolgirl.translation: 她給我看了一張她母親學生時代的照片。

loving.text: I cannot help loving her in spite of her many faults.
loving.translation: 雖然她有許多缺點，但我卻情不自禁地愛著她。

fist.text: She banged the table with her fist.

nutrition.text: She is careful about her child's nutrition.
nutrition.translation: 她很关心孩子的营养问题。

pack.text: She helped me pack my suitcase.
pack.translation: 她幫我打包我的手提箱。

earliest.text: She gets up the earliest in my family.
earliest.translation: 她是我家最早起床的人。

sees.text: She gives me a nasty look every time she sees me.
sees.translation: 她每次看見我都給露出厭惡的眼神。

nasty.text: She gives me a nasty look every time she sees me.
nasty.translation: 她每次看見我都給露出厭惡的眼神。

recede.text: My memory of her has begun to recede.
recede.translation: 我對於她的記憶開始消散。

offence.text: She took offence at my word.

insecure.text: She felt insecure about her future.
insecure.translation: 她對她的未來感到沒有安全感。

aerobics.text: She goes to aerobics once a week.
aerobics.translation: 她每星期去作一次健美操。

pebble.text: She stooped to pick up a pebble.

handy.text: She is handy with a needle.

veterinarian.text: She grew up to be a veterinarian.
veterinarian.translation: 她長大後成為了一名獸醫。

irrespective.text: She voted for Mr Nishioka irrespective of party lines.
irrespective.translation: 她不論黨派把票投給了西岡先生。

indifference.text: She assumed an air of indifference.

fragrant.text: She planted fragrant olives in the garden.

kiss.text: She gave him a tender kiss.
kiss.translation: 她給了他一個溫柔的吻。

sickness.text: She is absent because of sickness.

grief.text: She was filled with deep grief to hear of her father's sudden death.
grief.translation: 她得知父親突然離世，不禁心如刀割。

vulgar.text: She is extremely vulgar in her speech.

conceive.text: I can't conceive of living without him.
conceive.translation: 我無法想像生命中沒有他。

encourage.text: When I'm sad, my friends encourage me.
encourage.translation: 我傷心的時候，我的朋友會鼓勵我。

outlook.text: Let go of your negative outlook on life.
outlook.translation: 請拋開你那些負面的人生觀。

negative.text: Let go of your negative outlook on life.
negative.translation: 請拋開你那些負面的人生觀。

stairway.text: In an emergency, use the stairway, not the elevator.
stairway.translation: 事故發生時，敬勿使用電梯，請使用樓梯。

altitude.text: The plane flew at an altitude of 3,000 meters.
altitude.translation: 飛機在三千米的高空飛行。

indicate.text: Smiles do not always indicate pleasure.
indicate.translation: 微笑並不一定表示高興。

certificate.text: Please attach a certificate of quality.

notify.text: I will notify you of the arrival of the goods.
notify.translation: 货物运到，我会通知你们的。

complaint.text: There is no cause for complaint.

tailor.text: Father always has the tailor make his suits.
tailor.translation: 父親總是讓這位裁縫師為他做西裝。

sweeping.text: My father is sweeping the garage.

smoker.text: My father is a heavy smoker.

undergo.text: Father is going to undergo an operation.

old-fashioned.text: My father is a bit old-fashioned.

removed.text: The injured were removed from the scene.

squirrel.text: The squirrel advanced against the strong wind.

balloon.text: The balloon was caught in the tree.

investigate.text: A committee was constituted to investigate prices.
investigate.translation: 为了调查物价，成立了一个委员会。

verb.text: A sentence normally has a subject and a verb.
verb.translation: 句子通常有主詞和動詞。

lookout.text: The soldier kept a sharp lookout in the darkness.
lookout.translation: 這名士兵在黑暗中保持戒備。

equality.text: Equality is guaranteed by the Constitution.

kilogram.text: Rice is sold by the kilogram.
kilogram.translation: 米以公斤為單位來出售。

democratic.text: The United States of America is a democratic country.

criterion.text: Americans are said to regard the amount of money a man makes as a criterion of his ability.
criterion.translation: 据说美国人把一个人的收入视为评判他能力的重要尺度。

portrait.text: There is a portrait of Bob on the wall.
portrait.translation: 牆上掛著 Bob 的肖像畫。

wrap.text: Could you wrap this separately, please?

distract.text: Don't distract me while I am studying.
distract.translation: 我学习的时候不要打扰我。

sidewalk.text: I found a coin on the sidewalk.
sidewalk.translation: 我在人行道上發現了一枚硬幣。

maternal.text: Maternal love is greater than anything else.
maternal.translation: 母爱比任何别的东西都伟大。

weep.text: My mother did nothing but weep.
weep.translation: 我的母亲只是默默地哭泣。

split.translation: 讓我們平分這個報酬吧。

fundamental.text: Respect for law is fundamental to our society.
fundamental.translation: 尊重法律是我們社會的基礎。

objective.text: The objective of law is justice.

fund.text: Lobbyists for the bill funneled bribes into a campaign fund.
fund.translation: 該法案的說客把遊說賄款匯入了競選基金。

riot.text: There was only one warden on duty when the riot started.
riot.translation: 暴動開始時只有一位監獄長值班。

violence.text: Violence is the cancer of our society.

gang.text: The gang was planning a robbery.

roads.text: There are a lot of long and straight roads in Hokkaido.
roads.translation: 北海道有很多又長又直的路。

violate.text: I will never violate a law again.

circus.text: At the age of six, I was taken to a circus for the first time.
circus.translation: 在我六岁的时候，我第一次被带去看马戏。

dye.text: India ink produces an interesting pattern when used as a dye.
dye.translation: 墨汁用作染料时会产生有趣的图案。

pattern.text: India ink produces an interesting pattern when used as a dye.
pattern.translation: 墨汁用作染料时会产生有趣的图案。

preach.text: The main duty of a priest is to preach in church.
preach.translation: 牧師的主要職責是在教堂裏講道。

occupy.text: Books occupy most of his room.

tolerance.text: By reading books and discussing concepts, a person can gain wisdom and tolerance of differing ideas.
tolerance.translation: 藉由讀書和討論概念, 一個人能獲得智慧並包容不同的想法。

concepts.text: By reading books and discussing concepts, a person can gain wisdom and tolerance of differing ideas.
concepts.translation: 藉由讀書和討論概念, 一個人能獲得智慧並包容不同的想法。

betray.text: A true gentleman would not betray his friends.
betray.translation: 一个真正的绅士不会出卖他的朋友。

millions.text: Millions of people starve to death every year.
millions.translation: 每年有几百万人死于饥饿。

annually.text: Do you know how many people starve to death in the world annually?
annually.translation: 你知不知道全世界每年有多少人饿死呀？

pillow.text: Could I have a pillow and blanket?
pillow.translation: 給我一個枕頭和毛毯好嗎？

mock.text: The future pilot is trained in a mock cockpit.
mock.translation: 未来飞行员将在模拟操作室中训练。

mist.text: A boat suddenly appeared out of the mist.
mist.translation: 一艘船突然从雾中出现。

maintain.text: It is hard to maintain one's reputation.
maintain.translation: 維持一個人的聲譽是很難的。

status.text: Obviously, they are jealous of his wealth and status.
status.translation: 他们很明显在嫉妒他的财富和地位。

predict.text: It's hard to predict what the weather will be like tomorrow.
predict.translation: 很难说明天的天气将会怎样。

proof.text: It's so obvious we don't need proof.
proof.translation: 事情如此明顯所以我們不需要證明。

intense.text: How are you keeping off this intense heat?
intense.translation: 你是怎么避开这酷暑的？

bud.text: The trees are beginning to bud.

acute.text: A blind person's hearing is often very acute.
acute.translation: 盲人的耳朵通常十分靈敏。

justify.text: The end does not always justify the means.
justify.translation: 為了正當目的並非總是可以不擇手段.

bowling.text: At night, we usually go bowling.
bowling.translation: 我們經常在夜晚打保齡球。

instant.text: I had instant noodles as a midnight snack.

restless.text: I feel restless when I have to wait too long for my friend to show up.
restless.translation: 等朋友等太久时,会感到烦躁.

postman.text: The postman delivers letters every morning.
postman.translation: 邮递员每天早上都去送信。

ounce.text: An ounce of prevention is worth a pound of cure.

feeding.text: Sheep are feeding in the meadow.

probable.text: It is highly probable that the deletion of element C will still yield the same result.
probable.translation: 很有可能去掉C元素会得出同样的结果。

element.text: It is highly probable that the deletion of element C will still yield the same result.
element.translation: 很有可能去掉C元素会得出同样的结果。

scales.text: I weighed myself on the bathroom scales.
scales.translation: 我用浴室的体重计量了体重。

crack.text: A sharp crack of thunder split the sky.

abate.text: The storm didn't abate for several hours.
abate.translation: 风暴几个小时没有减弱了。

barn.text: We took refuge from the storm in a nearby barn.
barn.translation: 为躲避风暴，我们躲到了附近的一个谷仓内。

dizzy.text: I get dizzy spells when I stand up.
dizzy.translation: 我一站起来就觉得头晕。

sulfur.text: Sulfur burns with a blue flame.
sulfur.translation: 硫磺燃燒著藍色的火焰。

dragon.text: The dragon is an imaginary creature.
dragon.translation: 龍是人幻想出來的生物。

traveler.text: The traveler was delighted at the sight of a light in the distance.
traveler.translation: 发现了远处的灯光的旅行者欢喜不已。

noticeable.text: There are noticeable differences between the two.
noticeable.translation: 两者之间有显著的差别。

interests.text: A population policy should be considered on the international viewpoint so as to balance the interests of both sides.
interests.translation: 從國際的觀點看，應該考慮推行人口政策來平衡兩方的利益。

viewpoint.text: A population policy should be considered on the international viewpoint so as to balance the interests of both sides.
viewpoint.translation: 從國際的觀點看，應該考慮推行人口政策來平衡兩方的利益。

include.text: The price does not include the box.
include.translation: 這個價格不包含這個箱子。

cultivated.text: Good habits should be cultivated in childhood.

boundary.text: There is a fence marking the boundary between our yard and the neighbor's.
boundary.translation: 我家和邻居家以院子之间的篱笆为分界线。

jog.text: The man next door said he goes for a jog every morning.
jog.translation: 隔壁帅哥说他每天都去慢跑。

halt.text: As the train came to a halt, all of the passengers wondered what was happening.
halt.translation: 当列车停止时，所有的乘客都想知道发生了什么。

ample.text: We have ample time to catch our train.
ample.translation: 我们有充裕的时间赶上火车。

glimpse.text: I caught a glimpse of Mt. Fuji from the window of the train.
glimpse.translation: 我從火車車窗瞥見了富士山。

measles.text: Love is like the measles; we all have to go through it.
measles.translation: 愛情就像麻疹──一生總要經歷一次。

spending.text: An aging population will require more spending on health care.
spending.translation: 老龄化的人口需要更多医疗保健支出。

craftsman.text: A good craftsman takes pride in his work.
craftsman.translation: 好的工匠為自己的作品感到驕傲。

realise.text: He doesn't realise that he's tone deaf.
realise.translation: 他不知道他自己五音不全。

hitherto.text: Karl Marx says, "The history of all hitherto existing societies is the history of class struggles."
hitherto.translation: 卡尔·马克思说：“ 到目前为止的一切社会的历史都是阶级斗争的历史。”

societies.text: Karl Marx says, "The history of all hitherto existing societies is the history of class struggles."
societies.translation: 卡尔·马克思说：“ 到目前为止的一切社会的历史都是阶级斗争的历史。”

noun.text: Accordingly, besides noun declension patterns, there also existed a greater variety of verb conjugation patterns than in Modern English.
noun.translation: 因此，除了名詞的變格之外，也存在比現代英語多的動詞的各種變型。

existed.text: Accordingly, besides noun declension patterns, there also existed a greater variety of verb conjugation patterns than in Modern English.
existed.translation: 因此，除了名詞的變格之外，也存在比現代英語多的動詞的各種變型。

patterns.text: Accordingly, besides noun declension patterns, there also existed a greater variety of verb conjugation patterns than in Modern English.
patterns.translation: 因此，除了名詞的變格之外，也存在比現代英語多的動詞的各種變型。

accordingly.text: Accordingly, besides noun declension patterns, there also existed a greater variety of verb conjugation patterns than in Modern English.
accordingly.translation: 因此，除了名詞的變格之外，也存在比現代英語多的動詞的各種變型。

soap.text: This soap is infused with natural fragrances.
soap.translation: 这块肥皂里添加了天然香料。

resemblance.text: The resemblance between Sean and Conner is striking!
resemblance.translation: Sean 和 Conner 長得真像！

striking.text: The resemblance between Sean and Conner is striking!
striking.translation: Sean 和 Conner 長得真像！

malt.text: Beer is taxed according to its malt content, so low-malt beer is cheaper.
malt.translation: 因为啤酒会根据麦芽含量去征税，所以发泡酒会比较便宜。

scary.text: Possibly because he's got a beard, he looks scary at first glance but he's really a kind man.
scary.translation: 或许是因为他有胡子而让他乍看之下很可怕，其实他是个非常好的人。

hostage.text: Russia expresses regret for those lost in the hostage incident.
hostage.translation: 俄罗斯对在人质事件中牺牲的人们表示哀悼。

neighbour.text: A good neighbour is better than a brother far off.

attacks.text: Sleep deprivation increases risk of heart attacks.
attacks.translation: 睡眠不足增加心臟病發作的危險。

steep.text: The path zigzagged up the steep slope.
steep.translation: 這條小路沿著陡峭的斜坡蜿蜒而上。

encounter.text: His encounter with her is enriching his inner life.
encounter.translation: 与她的相遇丰富了他的精神生活。

domination.text: I guess she's into bondage and domination.
domination.translation: 我想她想要的是束縛與支配。

emperor.text: The princess begged forgiveness from the emperor.

applicant.text: Does the applicant have suitable abilities to carry out the job?
applicant.translation: 那位求職者能勝任工作嗎？

automatic.text: The girl, her eyes shining brightly from that single hint, makes her cute cat-motif automatic pencil run across her notebook.
automatic.translation: 這女孩的眼睛閃爍著光亮, 這個暗示讓她可愛的貓圖案自動鉛筆越過了她的筆記本。

hint.text: The girl, her eyes shining brightly from that single hint, makes her cute cat-motif automatic pencil run across her notebook.
hint.translation: 這女孩的眼睛閃爍著光亮, 這個暗示讓她可愛的貓圖案自動鉛筆越過了她的筆記本。

dear.text: "Hey! It's dangerous to run here." "Eh? ... A-a-Aaah!!" "Oh dear, what did I tell you?"
dear.translation: 「喂！這裏跑步很危險的。」「嗯？……啊、啊、啊！！」「唉，我剛才不是和你說了嗎？」

speakers.text: At the time there were no native English speakers teaching in any public school.
speakers.translation: 當時沒有任何以英語為母語的人在公立學校任教。

hereby.text: We, ACME Ltd., hereby announce that we will resist with all our strength this hostile takeover.
hereby.translation: 我們ACME有限公司，特此宣布，我們將盡我們的力量抵制這種惡意收購。

hostile.text: We, ACME Ltd., hereby announce that we will resist with all our strength this hostile takeover.
hostile.translation: 我們ACME有限公司，特此宣布，我們將盡我們的力量抵制這種惡意收購。

announce.text: We, ACME Ltd., hereby announce that we will resist with all our strength this hostile takeover.
announce.translation: 我們ACME有限公司，特此宣布，我們將盡我們的力量抵制這種惡意收購。

ltd.text: We, ACME Ltd., hereby announce that we will resist with all our strength this hostile takeover.
ltd.translation: 我們ACME有限公司，特此宣布，我們將盡我們的力量抵制這種惡意收購。

impressive.text: You've both been very impressive today. I'm proud of you.
impressive.translation: 今天你们俩很让人印象深刻。我为你们感到骄傲。

auxiliary.text: 'can' is an auxiliary verb, so in question sentences it is brought to the start of the phrase.
auxiliary.translation: 因為 can 是助動詞，在疑問句中被放到了句首。

complement.text: A complete intransitive verb takes neither complement nor object.

pupil.translation: 舉例說，如果一個老師警告學生不要吸煙，但自己卻每天吸個不停，那麼這個警告就是自相矛盾的了。

internal.text: The button battery in the PC's internal timer has gone flat.

argues.text: It's not an issue if he argues with his wife, but he shouldn't hit her.

rail.text: Is it convenient to transfer between the subway and the light rail here?
rail.translation: 这儿要换地铁和轻轨方便吗？

markets.text: Are there any markets or supermarkets around here? Is it convenient for daily shopping?
markets.translation: 这儿周围有没有小菜场跟大型超市，买生活用品方便吗？

lighting.text: Is this community safe? Are there lighting installations for the night?
lighting.translation: 小区安全吗？夜晚有照明设施吗？

rental.text: The rental should be somewhat close to where I work.
rental.translation: 租的房屋要离我工作地方近一点。

concrete.text: Great! Is the apartment bought as a concrete shell, or is it ready to move into?
concrete.translation: 太棒了！是毛坯房还是装修房？

delegation.text: Are some of you from the US trade delegation?
delegation.translation: 请问你们几位是美国贸易代表团的吗？

o.text: It's five o' clock. If you quickly post your letter, it still might make it in time.
o.translation: 五点钟，你的信赶快投进去还来得及。

recipient.text: Don't flip-flop the addresses of the sender and recipient!
recipient.translation: 不要把寄件人、收件人地址的姓名填反了！

stack.text: Hey, could you send over a stack of manuscripts straight away?
stack.translation: 喂，请问现在能给我马上送一叠稿子吗？

newly.text: Going to the newly built Greenland in Shanghai is really fun!
newly.translation: 去上海新建的绿地玩也特有劲！

fashionable.text: It's sort of fashionable, but the price is too high!
fashionable.translation: 虽然时髦一点，但是价钱太大！

channels.translation: 那么你频道换掉也行啊。

stroke.text: An elderly person in my family suddenly fell to the ground; he likely suffered a stroke.
stroke.translation: 我家里有个老年人突然倒在地上，大概是中风了。

slim.text: His body type is born balanced! Wide shoulders, slim waist, belly not popping outwards.
slim.translation: 他的体形生得很匀称！肩膀宽，腰身窄，肚子又没凸出来。

outwards.text: His body type is born balanced! Wide shoulders, slim waist, belly not popping outwards.
outwards.translation: 他的体形生得很匀称！肩膀宽，腰身窄，肚子又没凸出来。

outrageously.text: She dresses so outrageously; it looks completely ridiculous!
outrageously.translation: 她打扮得妖里妖气，一副傻样！

occupation.text: I like to do oil painting, but I don't intend to make that my lifelong occupation.
occupation.translation: 我喜欢画油画，但是我不想拿它做我的终身职业。

negotiations.text: I can translate between Chinese and English, and can participate in negotiations with foreigners.
negotiations.translation: 我可以做中英双向翻译，参加跟外国人交际谈判。

bar.text: Zailaiba Bar is hiring waiters; are you interested?
bar.translation: “再来吧”酒吧要招一个服务员，你有兴趣吗？

surf.text: Why do you go online, surf, chat, and use QQ every time you have free time, wasting an entire night on it?
surf.translation: 你怎么一有空就上网，冲浪灌水打QQ，一个夜晚就扔给它了？

immigration.text: Please let me see your passport, also did you complete the immigration form?
immigration.translation: 请你把护照出示给我看看，还有入境表格填好了吗？

testing.text: Teachers nowadays are super into testing. It seems that there's another test today.
testing.translation: 现在的老师么，非常迷信考试，据说今天又要考试啦。

super.text: Teachers nowadays are super into testing. It seems that there's another test today.
super.translation: 现在的老师么，非常迷信考试，据说今天又要考试啦。

concerns.text: The raising of children is something that concerns the entire community. There will be an education reform.
concerns.translation: 子女培养全社会都很关心，教育要进行改革。

respectful.text: One must be respectful when speaking, and not say obscene things.
respectful.translation: 开口要有礼貌，不讲下流话。

obscene.text: One must be respectful when speaking, and not say obscene things.
obscene.translation: 开口要有礼貌，不讲下流话。

alongside.text: Native Chinese people are working alongside foreigners to change the culture of Shanghai.
alongside.translation: 本地人、外来人齐心共创上海新文明。

unbeatable.text: Liu Bei and Zhuge Liang are an unbeatable team.
unbeatable.translation: 刘备和诸葛亮是一支无法战胜的队伍。

therapy.text: Demand for occupational therapy has surged in recent years.
therapy.translation: 这几年对作业疗法的需求在迅速增长。

chef.text: Our chef is very busy today.

gossip.text: The only time people dislike gossip is when you gossip about them.
gossip.translation: 人們不喜歡流言蜚語的唯一時間是當你閒聊他們的事。

pistol.text: Never trust a woman with a pistol in hand.
pistol.translation: 千万别相信一个手里拿手枪的女人。

costly.text: Why did you get such a costly dictionary?
costly.translation: 为什么你买了一本那么贵的词典？

conviction.text: Betty has a previous conviction for theft.

entry.text: Entry is strictly for staff only.

rash.translation: 我因为化妆品皮肤过敏了。

southern.text: Our restaurant is near the southern bus station.
southern.translation: 我们的饭店在汽车南站的附近。

punch.text: A punch is just a punch. A kick is just a kick.
punch.translation: 出拳就是出拳。出脚就是出脚。

persuasion.text: I was born into the Hebrew persuasion, but when I got older I converted to narcissism.
persuasion.translation: 我天生具有希伯來人的說服才能，但當我年紀大了的時候，我把它轉換成了自戀。

alcoholic.text: People who drink alcoholic beverages are not allowed to enter.

unity.text: Unity, justice and freedom are the pledge of fortune.
unity.translation: 团结、公正和自由是幸福的保证。

pledge.text: Unity, justice and freedom are the pledge of fortune.
pledge.translation: 团结、公正和自由是幸福的保证。

bland.text: Life would become bland without you.
bland.translation: 如果沒有你，我的人生就會變得空白一片。

surrounding.text: The surrounding area was very quiet.

ma.text: Lao Gan Ma and I have a love-hate relationship.
ma.translation: 我和老干妈有爱恨交加的关系。

excursion.text: A travel agent will arrange an excursion to Andalusia for you.
excursion.translation: 旅行社會爲你安排去安達盧西亞的旅行。

outstanding.text: He's a man of outstanding character.

grab.text: Grab a hold of the rope.

licence.text: My mother has a driving licence, but she doesn't drive.
licence.translation: 我母亲有驾照，但是她不开车。

grasshopper.text: That's not a grasshopper. It's a locust!

berlin.text: When did you move to Berlin?
berlin.translation: 你是什麼時候搬到柏林的呀？

invasion.text: Tatoeba: As if the geek invasion wasn't enough.
invasion.translation: Tatoeba:好像怪客入侵還不夠似的。

veteran.text: In Tatoeba, you gotta always listen to veteran members. They'll tell you what can't be done and why. Then do it.
veteran.translation: 在Tatoeba，你必須總是傾聽資深成員。他們會告訴你什麼不能做，以及為什麼。然後你去做。

mississippi.text: The Mississippi is the longest river in the United States.
mississippi.translation: 密西西比河是全美國最長的河。

male.text: I have three dogs. One is male and the other two are female.
male.translation: 我養了三隻狗，一隻是雄的，其餘兩隻是雌的。

spiritual.text: Not material, but spiritual things determine our life.
spiritual.translation: 我们的生活不是由物质，而是由精神来决定的。

hire.text: I would like to hire a car.

continues.text: If the pain continues you have to go to the doctor.
continues.translation: 如果持續疼痛, 你必須去看醫生。

essay.text: It took me 2 hours to finish the essay.
essay.translation: 这篇作文花了我两个小时来完成。

explode.text: The aim of this game is to explode all the bombs on the screen.
explode.translation: 這個遊戲的目的是引爆螢幕上所有的炸彈。

overlap.translation: 他们俩的影子重叠在一起。

donkey.text: Jessie urged the little donkey forward.

amongst.text: True art of life is to see the extraordinary amongst the ordinary.
amongst.translation: 生活真正的艺术是在平凡中看到不平凡。

auction.text: Instead of preparing a dinner by candlelight, she put her boyfriend up for auction on eBay.
auction.translation: 她没有准备烛光晚餐，而是把她的男友放到Ebay上拍卖。

incredible.text: It's incredible that your mother speaks six languages!
incredible.translation: 你母亲说六种语言真是让人难以置信！

dialog.text: I did not participate in the dialog.

regarding.text: Regarding education, he has extreme opinions.
regarding.translation: 关于教育，他持极端意见。

carp.text: Fish such as carp and trout live in fresh water.
carp.translation: 鲤鱼和鳟鱼等鱼类生活在淡水中。

shove.text: Shove a stick up your ass.
shove.translation: 把一根棍子塞进你的屁股里。

pharmacy.text: The pharmacy is near the hospital.

extinction.text: They are in danger of extinction.
extinction.translation: 牠們正面臨絕種的危機。

sly.text: He did it on the sly.

dusk.text: The children returned home at dusk.
dusk.translation: 夜幕降临时，孩子们回家了。

powder.text: The table is covered with powder.

hero.text: We called him a "hero", but he betrayed us.
hero.translation: 我们把他称为“英雄”，但是他却背叛了我们。

grazing.text: Cows are grazing in the meadow.

diligent.text: As far as I know, he's a diligent student.
diligent.translation: 就我所知，他是个很用功的学生。

ally.text: Germany was once an ally of Italy.
ally.translation: 德国曾是意大利的同盟国。

fathers.text: Let the fathers be fathers and the sons sons.

linguistic.text: Using Esperanto with him, I sense that we both are at the same level, at least from a linguistic point of view.
linguistic.translation: 我和他用世界語溝通，覺得最少從語言的觀點來看，我和他的程度是差不多的。

mute.text: She was blind, deaf, and mute.

outcome.text: Regardless what you may do, the outcome will still be the same.
outcome.translation: 不管你怎么做，结果都一样。

cartridge.text: Please replace the empty ink cartridge in the printer.
cartridge.translation: 请把打印机里面的空的墨粉鼓换掉。

ban.text: Germany is to ban employers from snooping on Facebook.
ban.translation: 德国将禁止雇主在脸书上偷窥。

input.text: The input method also works with this version.
input.translation: 此輸入法也適用於這個版本。

cactus.text: Your lips are soft like the surface of a cactus.
cactus.translation: 你的嘴唇軟綿綿的，就像仙人掌的表皮一樣。

prowess.text: His martial arts prowess has already reached a level of sublime perfection.
prowess.translation: 他的武功已经达到了出神入化的境界。

bond.text: "I'd look like a real James Bond in that," Dima said to himself, then entered the store.
bond.translation: 狄馬自言自語地說：「我穿上它，看起來就會像詹姆士龐德一樣。」然後就走進了店子裏。

stern.text: The teacher gave his pupils a stern telling-off.
stern.translation: 老師把學生狠狠地罵了一頓。

sparkle.text: I count the sparkle of constellations to foretell the future of my love.
sparkle.translation: 我數著星宿的星光來預測我愛情的未來。

bakery.text: The girl who works at the bakery is cute.
bakery.translation: 在面包房工作的姑娘很可爱。

shopkeeper.text: "You have expensive taste!" the shopkeeper exclaimed. "Are you sure you don't want to look through our cheaper variants first?"
shopkeeper.translation: 「您的品味真高！」店員嘆道。「不過我們還有一些價錢比較相宜的款式，您真的不要先看一下嗎？」

blunt.text: My sword may be blunt, but that's more than enough for someone like you.
blunt.translation: 我的剑虽然是钝的，但应付你的话是绰绰有余的。

jupiter.text: Jupiter is the largest planet in the Solar System.
jupiter.translation: 木星是太陽系中最大的行星。

amended.text: I am not without my shortcomings, but these shortcomings can easily be amended.
amended.translation: 我是个有缺点的人，但这些缺点很容易就能被改正。

grand.text: Please take me to the Grand Hotel.

arouse.text: How to arouse a woman's desire?

width.text: What's the width of this road?

diameter.text: Is it possible to determine the diameter from the circumference?
diameter.translation: 用圓周能不能求得直徑？

circumference.text: Is it possible to determine the diameter from the circumference?
circumference.translation: 用圓周能不能求得直徑？

programme.translation: 你最喜歡看哪個電視節目？

rainfall.text: We had a heavy rainfall last night.

interface.text: Please select a language for the Image Viewer interface.
interface.translation: 请为Image Viewer的界面选择语言。

select.text: Please select a language for the Image Viewer interface.
select.translation: 请为Image Viewer的界面选择语言。

autograph.text: Would you please autograph this book?
autograph.translation: 請您在這本書上簽名好嗎?

restroom.text: May I go to the restroom?

minus.text: How many is nine minus six?

practices.text: Mr. Sato practices archery on weekends.
practices.translation: 佐藤先生在週末練習射箭。

alien.text: If we ever came in contact with an alien race, how would we communicate with it?
alien.translation: 如果有天我們真的和外星人有了接觸，我們應該怎樣和他們溝通呢？

tray.text: Mr Yamaha filled the big tray in his living room with walnuts.
tray.translation: 雅馬哈先生在客廳裡的大托盤裡裝滿了核桃。

communist.text: I willingly join the Chinese Communist Party.
communist.translation: 我自愿加入中国共产党。

acoustic.text: An electric guitar doesn't sound the same as an acoustic one.
acoustic.translation: 電結他的聲音和木結他不同。

shares.text: China shares borders with Pakistan, India, Afghanistan, Tajikistan, Kyrgyzstan, Kazakhstan, North Korea, Laos, Vietnam, Nepal, Bhutan, Myanmar, Mongolia and Russia.
shares.translation: 中国与巴基斯坦、印度、阿富汗、塔吉克斯坦、吉尔吉斯斯坦、哈萨克斯坦、北朝鲜、老挝、越南、尼泊尔、不丹、缅甸、蒙古和俄罗斯接壤。

models.text: All models are wrong, but some are useful.
models.translation: 所有的模型都有错，不过有些还是有用的。

arguments.text: Most students agree with the proposal and have made a list of arguments in favour of it.
arguments.translation: 大多数学生同意这个建议，并列出了他们同意的理由。

turbulent.text: The turbulent sands above our heads, the flinging of our swords... they're naught but falling stars in the night sky.
turbulent.translation: 在我們頭頂飛舞著的沙粒，在我們手中揮動著的刀劍……它們不是甚麼，只不過是在夜空中擦過的一朵朵流星。

audio.text: Audio in Tatoeba sentences are provided by Shtooka.
audio.translation: Tatoeba句子的音頻是由Shtooka所提供。

gay.text: And if I were gay, would that be a crime?
gay.translation: 如果我是同志那又怎样？这能构成犯罪吗？

glove.text: My favorite word in German is the word for "glove".
glove.translation: 我最喜歡的德文字是「手套」。

lure.text: No man can resist the lure of a woman.
lure.translation: 没有男人能够抵挡女人的诱惑。

apace.translation: 莠草易長， 惡習易染。

chlorine.text: There's a chance that tap water may contain harmful substances like chlorine and lead.
chlorine.translation: 自來水有可能含有氯、鉛等有害物質。

tap.text: There's a chance that tap water may contain harmful substances like chlorine and lead.
tap.translation: 自來水有可能含有氯、鉛等有害物質。

fabulous.text: The unicorn is a fabulous monster.
fabulous.translation: 獨角獸是一種美麗的怪物。

nerve.text: She had the nerve to speak out.

carrier.text: Has the letter carrier been by yet?

wilson.text: Mr. Wilson is angry at Dennis.
wilson.translation: 威爾遜先生對丹尼斯很生氣。

delivery.text: The pizza delivery guy hasn't come by yet.

swarm.text: A swarm of hornets attacked the children.
swarm.translation: 一窩黃蜂襲擊了孩子們。

explorer.text: Christopher Columbus wasn't an explorer because he loved the sea. He was an explorer because he hated Spanish jails.
explorer.translation: 哥倫布不是一位探險家, 因為他熱愛大海。他是一位探險家, 因為他討厭西班牙監獄。

ax.text: The tree was felled with one hard blow of his ax.
ax.translation: 他用斧頭重重的斬了一下，那棵樹就倒了下來。

residence.text: Everyone has the right to freedom of movement and residence within the borders of each State.
residence.translation: 每個人在各國境內均享有遷徙自由與居住自由的權利。

keyboard.text: The Swiss keyboard doesn't have a ß.
keyboard.translation: 瑞士的鍵盤沒有「ß」這個符號。

calorie.text: High calorie foods are bad for my health.
calorie.translation: 高卡路里的食物對我的身體不好。

client.text: The lawyer warned his client against testifying, but he did it anyway.
client.translation: 律師警告過他的當事人反對作證, 但是他還是這麼做了。

flaw.text: I can't find a single flaw in his theory.
flaw.translation: 我在他的理論中找不到任何問題。

mechanical.text: I got a piece of lead for my mechanical pencil from her.
mechanical.translation: 我从她那里拿了一根自动铅笔芯。

du.text: It was in 1832 that Evariste Galois fell in love with Stephanie-Felicie Poterin du Motel.
du.translation: 1832年Evariste Galois和Stephanie-Felicie Poterin du Motel陷入熱戀。

resulting.text: I'm obliged to find a way out of the resulting situation.
resulting.translation: 我应该去找到解决问题的办法。

outlet.text: I spilled jam on the electric outlet and there was a short circuit.
outlet.translation: 我把果酱撒到电源插座上短路了。

circuit.text: I spilled jam on the electric outlet and there was a short circuit.
circuit.translation: 我把果酱撒到电源插座上短路了。

pyramid.text: There's a pyramid in Mexico bigger than any of those in Egypt.
pyramid.translation: 在墨西哥有一座金字塔比在埃及的任何一座都大。

drawback.text: Brilliant people have one major drawback - they don't know how to lose.
drawback.translation: 天才们有一个重要的缺点：他们不会输。

airmail.text: I'm sending you a birthday present by airmail.
airmail.translation: 我寄給你一個航空郵件生日禮物。

daniel.translation: 丹尼尔看起来像个维吾尔族人。

unlikely.translation: 他們沒有甚麼可能會結婚。

wick.text: A candle without a wick is no candle at all.
wick.translation: 蠟燭沒有了芯，就不能算是蠟燭了。

grandchild.text: Maybe my grandchild will be the first person to set foot on Mars.
grandchild.translation: 可能我的孙子会是登陆火星的第一人。

practically.text: Although this sentence has no grammatical mistakes, I think it would practically never be used.
practically.translation: 这句话虽然语法没错，但我认为现实中几乎没人会这么说。

christian.text: Going to church doesn't make you a Christian any more than standing in a garage makes you a car.
christian.translation: 去教堂參加禮拜，不會馬上就變成一個基督徒，就好像站在車房裏，不會變成一輛車一樣。

transmission.text: Can you drive a manual transmission?

geometry.text: If geometry is the science of space, what is the science of time?
geometry.translation: 如果说几何学是空间的科学，那时间的科学是什么？

eleventh.text: A stay of execution was ordered at the eleventh hour.
eleventh.translation: 缓期执行在最后关头决定了下来。

execution.text: A stay of execution was ordered at the eleventh hour.
execution.translation: 缓期执行在最后关头决定了下来。

impress.text: Parents try to impress upon their children the importance of honesty and hard work.
impress.translation: 父母试图将诚实和工作的重要性灌输给孩子。

tag.text: I'm going to run a couple of errands. Wanna tag along?
tag.translation: 我要去购物。你要跟着来吗？

moustache.text: You can't seriously expect that they won't recognize you in that disguise. That lopsided, dime store moustache is a dead giveaway!
moustache.translation: 你不能指望他们认不出你的伪装。那个歪半边的一角店胡子是致命漏洞！

drown.text: I have to wear earplugs to drown out all the noise from the construction site next door.
drown.translation: 我不得不戴耳塞来阻隔旁边建筑工地的所有噪音。

populations.text: The populations of China and India dwarf those of every other nation.
populations.translation: 中国和印度的人口超过了其他任何国家。

dwarf.text: The populations of China and India dwarf those of every other nation.
dwarf.translation: 中国和印度的人口超过了其他任何国家。

isle.text: They were marooned on a desert isle.
isle.translation: 她们被抛弃在一座荒岛上。

weekly.text: My dad gives me a weekly allowance that I use to buy comics and ice cream.
weekly.translation: 我爸爸每周给我零用钱，我会用来买漫画书和冰激凌。

allowance.text: My dad gives me a weekly allowance that I use to buy comics and ice cream.
allowance.translation: 我爸爸每周给我零用钱，我会用来买漫画书和冰激凌。

submit.text: Don't change sentences that are correct. You can, instead, submit natural-sounding alternative translations.
submit.translation: 请勿更改没有错误的句子。请添加一个新的更自然的翻译。

sources.text: Don't add sentences from copyrighted sources.
sources.translation: 请勿由享有版权的来源添加句子。

revision.text: Date of last revision of this page: 2010-11-03
revision.translation: 最後修訂此頁日期：2010年11月3日

infrared.text: People show up bright on an infrared camera because of their body heat.
infrared.translation: 人會因為體溫而在紅外線攝影機上顯現。

taboo.text: It exists, but seeing as it is taboo and that nobody talks about it, there's no need to have words for it.
taboo.translation: 它的確存在, 但是因為人們將它視為禁忌而不去談論它, 也就不需要多說什麼了。

probe.text: I dare not probe too deeply, lest I uncover the awful truth!
probe.translation: 我不敢探查得太深, 以免發現可怕的事實。

uncover.text: I dare not probe too deeply, lest I uncover the awful truth!
uncover.translation: 我不敢探查得太深, 以免發現可怕的事實。

surprising.text: It was all more and more surprising.

compartment.text: I found the secret compartment quite by accident.
compartment.translation: 我完全是在偶然的情况下发现了密室。

database.text: Just because it's in Tatoeba.org's database, doesn't mean it's a sentence.

asteroid.text: The asteroid broke up into small pieces as it entered Earth's atmosphere.
asteroid.translation: 进入地球大气层后，小行星分裂成了无数的小块。

bare.text: It is not easy to catch a hare with your bare hands.
bare.translation: 空手赤拳抓野兔並不容易。

representatives.text: Prospectuses must be signed by two sponsor representatives.

sponsor.text: Prospectuses must be signed by two sponsor representatives.
sponsor.translation: 招股说明书必须由两名保荐代表人签字。

hike.translation: 我們應該取消這次遠足。

tick.text: I like to take things apart to see what makes them tick.
tick.translation: 我喜歡把東西拆開，看看裏面的結構。

disposable.text: In this society where everything is disposable, it is a virtue to use something until it wears out.

ethics.text: The senator was censured by the congressional ethics committee.
ethics.translation: 议员受到了议会道德委员会的谴责。

congressional.text: The senator was censured by the congressional ethics committee.
congressional.translation: 议员受到了议会道德委员会的谴责。

senator.text: The senator was censured by the congressional ethics committee.
senator.translation: 议员受到了议会道德委员会的谴责。

organizations.text: The sports world should, at this time, eliminate the collusion with criminal organizations.
organizations.translation: 在这个时候，体育世界应当减少犯罪组织的勾结。

earthworm.text: The earthworm wriggled when I touched it.
earthworm.translation: 我碰蚯蚓的时候，它扭动起来。

cop.text: It seems that the policeman in this TV series is a dirty cop who abuses his authority.
cop.translation: 這套電視劇裏的驚察似乎是個濫用職權的壞蛋。

puts.text: He puts a lot of thought into how he thinks.
puts.translation: 他对自己的思维方式进行着很多思考。

crane.text: The crane, unlike the dog, has never dreamed of flying.
crane.translation: 不像狗, 這隻鶴從來沒有夢想過飛翔。

ethical.text: Would it be ethical to sacrifice one person to save many?
ethical.translation: 为了救许多人牺牲一个人是否道德？

sacrifice.text: Would it be ethical to sacrifice one person to save many?
sacrifice.translation: 为了救许多人牺牲一个人是否道德？

lame.text: The new Harry Potter movie is pretty lame.
lame.translation: 哈利波特的新片十分差。

potter.text: The new Harry Potter movie is pretty lame.
potter.translation: 哈利波特的新片十分差。

evacuate.text: We have less than five minutes to evacuate the whole building.
evacuate.translation: 我们有不到五分钟来疏散整栋楼的人。

stereotype.text: It is a stereotype that police officers always eat doughnuts.
stereotype.translation: 警察總吃甜甜圈是一種刻板印象。

repetition.text: Repetition is the mother of memory.

uproar.text: On the day of my birthday, my friends made me drink and I caused quite an uproar.
uproar.translation: 在我生日那天，朋友讓我喝酒，我大鬧一番。

texts.translation: 說話就如過眼雲煙，文字卻能流傳千古。

astonish.text: Always do right. This will gratify some people and astonish the rest.
astonish.translation: 坚持做对的事情。这会满足一部分人同时使另一部分人感到惊讶。

emotion.text: Any emotion, if it is sincere, is involuntary.
emotion.translation: 任何情绪，只要它是真诚的，就说明它是发自内心的自然流露。

apparently.text: Apparently, there is nothing that cannot happen today.
apparently.translation: 显然，今天什么事都有可能发生。

pliable.text: Facts are stubborn things, but statistics are pliable.
pliable.translation: 事实是倔强的，但统计是柔顺的。

holes.text: The more cheese, the more holes. The more holes, the less cheese. Thus: The more cheese, the less cheese.
holes.translation: 越多奶酪越多洞。洞越多則奶酪越少。因此: 奶酪越多就越少奶酪。

documentary.text: That documentary about the environmental crisis was a real eye-opener.
documentary.translation: 這部有關環境危機的紀錄片真是令人大開眼界。

crater.text: Some of the bluest water in the world is found in Crater Lake.
crater.translation: 一些世界上最藍的水在火山湖。

monitor.text: I'll monitor your progress from my computer.
monitor.translation: 我會用我的電腦監察你的進度。

condone.text: The Catholic Church doesn't condone the use of condoms.
condone.translation: 天主教廷不同意避孕套的使用。

employee.text: Tom accused the employee of stealing.
employee.translation: 汤姆指认了盗窃的职员。

bones.text: Tom broke some bones in his arm and hand.
bones.translation: 湯姆的手臂和手斷了些骨頭。

acupuncture.text: Many people believe acupuncture can cure diseases.
acupuncture.translation: 很多人都相信針灸有治癒疾病的功效。

frighten.text: Scary movies will frighten the children.

tank.text: The fuel tank in the car is full.

fusion.text: Jazz fusion is a combination of rock and jazz.
fusion.translation: 融合爵士是搖滾樂與爵士樂的融合。

combination.text: Jazz fusion is a combination of rock and jazz.
combination.translation: 融合爵士是搖滾樂與爵士樂的融合。

monopoly.text: Monopoly is a popular game for families to play.
monopoly.translation: 大富翁是一個家庭玩的熱門遊戲。

gene.text: Some diseases are caused by a defective gene.
gene.translation: 一些疾病的产生原因是基因缺陷。

engineering.text: Should we use genetic engineering on people?
engineering.translation: 我们应该对人使用基因编辑吗？

genetic.text: Should we use genetic engineering on people?
genetic.translation: 我们应该对人使用基因编辑吗？

hills.text: It's good exercise to climb hills.

offensive.text: The speaker's comments were highly offensive.
offensive.translation: 发言人的评论极有攻击性。

saturn.translation: 許多衛星繞著土星運行。

orbit.translation: 許多衛星繞著土星運行。

treasurer.text: I resigned from my position as club treasurer.
treasurer.translation: 我辭去了俱樂部司庫的職位。

tragic.text: They both cried after hearing the tragic news.
tragic.translation: 聽到這件悲劇，他倆盡皆哭泣。

treason.text: In some countries, the punishment for treason can be life in prison.
treason.translation: 在一些國家，叛國罪的懲罰可以是終身監禁。

hurricane.text: After the hurricane, their house was a wreck.
hurricane.translation: 暴风雨过后，他们的房子成了废墟。

x-ray.text: The X-ray showed two broken fingers.
x-ray.translation: X光片显示两根手指断了。

axis.text: The earth revolves on its axis once every 24 hours.
axis.translation: 地球每二十四小時就會繞軸自轉一周。

cease.text: Facts do not cease to exist because they are ignored.
cease.translation: 不是因为某人不理事实它们就会不复存在了。

intellectual.text: An intellectual is a person who has discovered something more interesting than sex.
intellectual.translation: 一个知识分子是发现到一种比性行为更有意思的活动的人。

ice-cream.text: Stracciatella ice-cream is nothing but a plain ice-cream with chocolate chips.
ice-cream.translation: 斯特拉恰泰拉冰淇淋只不過是一種添加了巧克力碎的普通冰淇淋。

medication.text: The medication should be administered topically.

flavoring.text: The cough syrup has a licorice flavoring.
flavoring.translation: 咳嗽糖浆有股甘草的味道。

syrup.text: The cough syrup has a licorice flavoring.
syrup.translation: 咳嗽糖浆有股甘草的味道。

journalism.text: In a democracy, it is important for journalism to be independent.
journalism.translation: 在民主国家，报刊的独立是很重要的。

millionaire.text: I'd like to be a millionaire.

containing.text: You can search sentences containing a certain word and get translations for these sentences.
containing.translation: 你们可以搜索含有某个词的句子并得到这些句子的翻译。

contribute.text: And everyone has the ability to contribute.
contribute.translation: 每个人都有能力作贡献。

stark.text: My little brother ran through the living room stark naked.
stark.translation: 我弟弟全身光溜溜地跑過客廳。

analyze.translation: 我们想验一下您的尿液。

bull.text: He likes to throw the bull.

sane.text: Rousseau was mad but influential; Hume was sane but had no followers.
sane.translation: 盧梭是瘋狂的, 但有影響力; 休謨是理智的, 但沒有追隨者。

derive.text: Superstitions derive from the inability of men to acknowledge that coincidences are merely coincidences.
derive.translation: 迷信之所以存在，是因為人無法接受巧合只是巧合而已。

portion.translation: 我們會把一部分籌得的款項用來幫助殘疾兒童。

adjusted.text: I'm just wondering how you are getting on and if you have adjusted to the new environment.
adjusted.translation: 不知近况如何，你适应新环境了没有。

dissertation.text: I've been really busy with my graduation dissertation recently.
dissertation.translation: 我最近真忙于我的毕业论文。

dynasty.text: Both of these are Song Dynasty block-printed editions.

v.text: With the T.V. on, how can you keep your mind on your studies?

t.text: With the T.V. on, how can you keep your mind on your studies?
t.translation: 你开着电视怎么能安心学习呢？

strive.text: No matter how hard I strive, I fail to achieve my parents' requirements.
strive.translation: 不管我怎么努力，也达不到父母的要求。

pit.text: The demon grabbed my sister and, with howling laughter, cast her into a bottomless pit.
pit.translation: 惡魔一把抓住了我的妹妹，一邊猙獰地狂笑着，一邊把她丟進了一個無底洞裏。

qualities.text: In fact, people are equal in their qualities.
qualities.translation: 其實，每一個人的條件都是一樣的。

william.text: Prince William is second in line to the English throne.
william.translation: 威廉王子是英国王位第二顺位继承人

levels.text: Melting polar icecaps could also contribute to an increase in sea levels.
levels.translation: 融化中的极地冰盖也可以使海平面上涨的势态更加严重。

classic.text: The qipao is a classic female garment that originated in 17th century China.
classic.translation: 旗袍是一种17世纪起源于中国的传统式样的女性服装。

garment.text: The qipao is a classic female garment that originated in 17th century China.
garment.translation: 旗袍是一种17世纪起源于中国的传统式样的女性服装。

periodic.text: He learnt the periodic table by heart just for fun.
periodic.translation: 他背週期表只是為了好玩。

stationery.text: All of this stationery is his.

slender.text: Slender and form-fitting with a high cut, the new qipao contrasted sharply with the traditional one.
slender.translation: 新的旗袍又修长又紧身，也有短裙摆，与传统式样构成了鲜明的对比。

equally.text: By the 1940s, the qipao came in a wide variety of designs and fabrics, with an equally wide variety of accessories.
equally.translation: 到了四十年代，旗袍有了种类繁多的图案和面料，也有了同样种类繁多的饰品。

designs.text: By the 1940s, the qipao came in a wide variety of designs and fabrics, with an equally wide variety of accessories.
designs.translation: 到了四十年代，旗袍有了种类繁多的图案和面料，也有了同样种类繁多的饰品。

censor.text: I wonder which country will be the first to censor Tatoeba.
censor.translation: 我想知道哪个国家会第一个和谐Tatoeba？

forbid.text: I cannot forbid a person to marry several wives, for it does not contradict Scripture.
forbid.translation: 我不能禁止一个人娶好几个妻子，因为这与圣经不矛盾。

contradict.text: I cannot forbid a person to marry several wives, for it does not contradict Scripture.
contradict.translation: 我不能禁止一个人娶好几个妻子，因为这与圣经不矛盾。

wives.text: I cannot forbid a person to marry several wives, for it does not contradict Scripture.
wives.translation: 我不能禁止一个人娶好几个妻子，因为这与圣经不矛盾。

invest.text: Don't be afraid to invest time and energy.
