resolve.translation: 如果你沒決心做好男人,那你就得不到好女人。

pursuit.text: In fact, love is the only genuinely precious thing in life; it's also the only thing worthy of pursuit.
pursuit.translation: 其實愛情是人生唯一的、真正珍貴的;也是唯一的、真正值得追求的東西。

embrace.text: Why do women want to sleep in a man's embrace?
embrace.translation: 女人为什么想被男人抱着睡觉？

conservation.text: The giant panda is recognised as a national treasure of China, but in some conservation areas it is still killed by poachers.
conservation.translation: 大熊猫被认为是中国的国宝，但在一些保护区，它仍被偷猎。

increasingly.text: In England, parks taking rare breeds of animals as their theme are becoming increasingly popular with people.
increasingly.translation: 在英国，以珍稀物种为主题的公园变得越来越受人们的欢迎。

wildlife.text: During the holidays, some university students go to Africa as volunteers and help to perfect local wildlife conservation.
wildlife.translation: 一些大学生在假期去非洲做志愿者 ，帮助当地完善野生生物管理。

endangered.text: Murdering elephants, tigers and other endangered species is not just cruel; it's also illegal.
endangered.translation: 杀害大象、老虎等濒危物种，不仅是残忍的，也是非法的。

advocate.text: More and more environmentalists advocate and use environmentally friendly unleaded petrol in cars.
advocate.translation: 越来越多的环保者开始宣传和使用以环保的无铅汽油为燃料的汽车。

petrol.text: More and more environmentalists advocate and use environmentally friendly unleaded petrol in cars.
petrol.translation: 越来越多的环保者开始宣传和使用以环保的无铅汽油为燃料的汽车。

recycle.text: We must make the utmost effort to reduce the use of plastic packaging, and also to recycle all waste plastic.
recycle.translation: 我们应该尽我们最大的努力减少塑料包装的使用，并回收所有的塑料废物。

organic.text: Some people only buy organic food; they think that in this way their body will not be damaged by pollutants.
organic.translation: 一些人只买有机的食物，他们认为这样可以使他们的健康不受污染的损害。

sufficient.text: I have not yet collected sufficient materials to write a book.
sufficient.translation: 我還沒有收集到足夠的材料來寫一本書。

bureau.text: Leave the bike here, and tomorrow bring your ID and 20 dollars to the Bureau of Communications to get the bike back.
bureau.translation: 你们把自行车留下，明天带着身份证和20块钱到交通局领自行车。

communications.text: Leave the bike here, and tomorrow bring your ID and 20 dollars to the Bureau of Communications to get the bike back.
communications.translation: 你们把自行车留下，明天带着身份证和20块钱到交通局领自行车。

comply.text: Hopefully you'll comply with traffic regulations after this.
comply.translation: 希望你们以后严格遵守交通规则。

formation.text: Fundamentally, the formation of the twelve zodiac signs is related to animal worship.
formation.translation: 從根本上說，十二生肖的形成，與動物崇拜有關。

array.text: Behind every animal on the Chinese zodiac lies an array of proverbs, sayings and stories.
array.translation: 每一個生肖的背後都有著數不盡的成語、諺語和故事。

disagreement.text: They express disagreement by shaking their heads, which may indicate agreement in other countries.
disagreement.translation: 他们以摇头表示不同意，而其他国家的人可能以摇头表示同意。

institute.text: At The Happiness Institute in Australia, a couple of hundred dollars may do the trick.
institute.translation: 在澳大利亚的快乐协会，两百块钱可能达到效果。

relationships.text: As much as 90 percent of happiness comes from elements such as attitude, life control and relationships.
relationships.translation: 高达百分之九十的快乐来自看法、生活控制、关系等因素。

significantly.text: While most of us are significantly better off financially than our parents and grandparents, happiness levels haven't changed to reflect that.
significantly.translation: 虽然我们大多数人比我们的父母、祖父母还要富裕得多，但是与之相应的快乐程度却没有多大的改变。

additional.text: Studies show that once the basic needs of shelter and food are met, additional wealth adds very little to happiness.
additional.translation: 研究表明人们一有住处、食物这些基本的需要，附加的财富就不能大量地提高他们的快乐。

adds.text: Studies show that once the basic needs of shelter and food are met, additional wealth adds very little to happiness.
adds.translation: 研究表明人们一有住处、食物这些基本的需要，附加的财富就不能大量地提高他们的快乐。

anonymous.text: The questions will not take long, and everything would be kept completely anonymous.
anonymous.translation: 问题不需要占用很多时间，也完全不要留名。

decoration.text: This house is nearby, it has two bedrooms and a living room, and the decoration isn't bad; it's 1500 a month.
decoration.translation: 这房子在附近，两室一厅，装修也不错，一个月1500。

implication.text: The implication was that where there was a well, there were residents.
implication.translation: 含義是哪裡有水井，哪裡就有居民。

courtyard.text: In Beijing, hutongs are alleys formed by lines of siheyuans, the traditional courtyard residences.
courtyard.translation: 在北京，胡同是由四合院的传统居所排形成。

patriotic.text: Chinese people have the most patriotic stomachs.

protected.text: More recently, some hutongs have been designated as protected areas in an attempt to preserve this aspect of Chinese cultural history.
protected.translation: 最近，有些胡同被指定为保护区，以试图保存这方面的中国文化历史。

designated.text: More recently, some hutongs have been designated as protected areas in an attempt to preserve this aspect of Chinese cultural history.
designated.translation: 最近，有些胡同被指定为保护区，以试图保存这方面的中国文化历史。

experimental.text: What did the experimental set-up look like? What was connected to what and how?
experimental.translation: 实验构造是怎样的？它们是如何相连接的？

sporadically.text: Does the error occur regularly or sporadically? Is the error reproducible?
sporadically.translation: 错误是经常出现还是偶尔出现？错误是否能够模仿？

converse.text: It was nice to converse with her.

windscreen.text: Someone broke the windscreen of my new car.
windscreen.translation: 有人把我新车的挡风玻璃砸碎了。

rug.text: When I didn't have any money, I only had a rug for a bed.
rug.translation: 我没有钱的时候，只能以地毯为床。

flash.text: I use flash cards to study my German vocabulary.
flash.translation: 我用字卡來學德文生字。

exhale.text: If you can see your breath when you exhale, you know it's cold.
exhale.translation: 如果呼气的时候能看到自己的气，你就知道天气很冷。

cargo.text: Khaki shorts with cargo pockets do not make you an adventurer.
cargo.translation: 單有卡其褲，還成不了冒險家。

shorts.text: Khaki shorts with cargo pockets do not make you an adventurer.
shorts.translation: 單有卡其褲，還成不了冒險家。

colleges.text: Peterhouse is the oldest of the 33 colleges of Cambridge.
colleges.translation: 剑桥的三十三个学院中，以彼得学院最为古老。

stout.text: Irish stout is the best beer.
stout.translation: 啤酒以爱尔兰黑啤酒为最佳。

check-up.text: I want to go to the hospital to get a complete check-up.
check-up.translation: 我想去医院做一个全面的检查。

dormitory.text: I left the notes in the dormitory. I'll go back and get them now.
dormitory.translation: 我把笔记放在宿舍了，现在回去拿。

substitute.text: Then I'll work on the principle that deference is no substitute for obedience.
substitute.translation: 那我就恭敬不如从命啦。

eve.text: Dumplings are essential at the New Year's Eve dinner table.
eve.translation: 饺子是年夜饭桌上必不可少的。

reunion.text: This means that eating dumplings on New Year's eve is a symbol of family reunion.
reunion.translation: 说明年夜饭的饺子是亲人团聚的象征。

dumpling.text: In Chinese, 'dumpling' and 'first exchange' are homophones, so they have a rich cultural association.
dumpling.translation: 在中文里面，饺子和“交子”谐音，因而具有丰富的文化涵义。

fragile.translation: 所有的思念与祝福都包进了那薄薄的饺子皮里。

unknown.text: The cause of the fire was unknown.

relations.text: As China develops, more and more countries want to have good relations with it.
relations.translation: 越來越多國家隨著中國的發展而希望跟中國有好的關係。

fade.text: Her beauty will fade in time.
fade.translation: 她的美貌會隨着時間而流逝。

deadly.text: The tip of the spear was dipped in a deadly poison.

lasting.text: No hobby is as cheap as reading, nor provides such long lasting enjoyment.

enjoyment.text: No hobby is as cheap as reading, nor provides such long lasting enjoyment.
enjoyment.translation: 没有任何娱乐像阅读这般廉价，也没有任何愉悦像阅读这般持久。

describing.text: Every function should have comments describing its purpose in order to avoid confusion.

revised.translation: 为了顺利推进项目，我们已经修订了几次计划。

feasible.text: We have come to the conclusion that this plan is not feasible currently.

undoubtedly.text: All these new blocks will undoubtedly impact the loading speed of the home page.

award.text: In addition, we will issue the 'employee of the month' award afterwards.
award.translation: 另外，之后我们会颁发“每月最佳员工”奖。

surveillance.text: Tom didn't notice the surveillance camera.
surveillance.translation: 汤姆没有注意到监控摄像头。

passenger.text: Tom put the large picnic basket on the passenger seat next to him.

humiliate.text: I didn't want to humiliate you.

dot.text: The general meeting began at 9 am on the dot.

academic.text: Academic fraud is more common than you might think.

fraud.text: Academic fraud is more common than you might think.

interpret.text: This moment will nap, you will have a dream; But this moment study,you will interpret a dream.
interpret.translation: 此刻打盹，你将做梦；而此刻学习，你将圆梦。

wander.text: But meanwhile it flees: time flees irretrievably, while we wander around, prisoners of our love of detail.
wander.translation: 但与此同时，它却在消逝：时间无可挽回地流逝， 而我们却四处游荡，成为我们对细节的热爱的囚徒。

meanwhile.text: But meanwhile it flees: time flees irretrievably, while we wander around, prisoners of our love of detail.
meanwhile.translation: 但与此同时，它却在消逝：时间无可挽回地流逝， 而我们却四处游荡，成为我们对细节的热爱的囚徒。

arthur.text: Arthur isn't as happy as Mike.
arthur.translation: 阿图尔并不像麦克那么高兴。

layer.text: I have a dull pain in my temples and my mind feels like its covered with a thin layer of fog.

obtaining.translation: 人们在此世中看不到任何获得幸福的希望，便很本能地想在彼世中寻求慰藉。

publisher.text: This publisher specializes in children's literature.

outgoing.translation: 萊拉很外向、有愛心、會照顧人。

ecological.text: The ecological footprint of a country is closely related to its level of economic development.

cosmos.text: To date nobody knows the actual size of the cosmos.

torch.text: You won't see a thing without a torch.

oasis.text: There is an oasis in the desert.

legislation.text: The President of the United States has the power to veto and send back legislation.
legislation.translation: 美國總統有權否決與退回法案。

veto.text: The President of the United States has the power to veto and send back legislation.
veto.translation: 美國總統有權否決與退回法案。

landmass.text: Owing to its landmass, the Antarctic has an air temperature lower than that of the Arctic.
landmass.translation: 南極因為有大陸，所以氣溫低於北極。

regulation.text: From today on this regulation is history.
regulation.translation: 從今天開始，這項規定成為了歷史。

ozone.text: The ozone in the stratosphere absorbs ultraviolet radiation.
ozone.translation: 平流層的臭氧會吸收紫外線。

curse.text: Yes, people usually curse at someone they are acquainted with.
curse.translation: 對，人通常會對自己的熟人口出惡言。

airline.translation: 這個航空公司的飛機怎麼樣？

aluminum.text: The aluminum castings must be brushed again.
aluminum.translation: 这个铝铸件需要重刷一遍.

mighty.text: You scorned both the Nymphs, who beheld your deeds, and me the mighty Pan.
mighty.translation: 你蔑視了目睹你罪行的仙女們，也蔑視了我を這位強大的潘神。

images.text: Images and videos are transformed into gifs and memes.
images.translation: 图像和视频被转换为GIF和哏。

reluctant.text: Tom is reluctant to talk about it.

compatriot.text: He is not willing to testify for his compatriot.

ingredient.text: Cookies may contain nuts or peanuts, even if not included in the ingredient list.
ingredient.translation: 雖然配料表中未列出堅果和花生，但餅乾中仍可能含有這些成分。。

mainland.text: Tomorrow, I am coming back from Hong Kong to the mainland.
mainland.translation: 明天我要從香港去趟內地。

glorious.text: Therefore, for the glorious God, you must accept each other, and accept Jesus Christ in the same way.
glorious.translation: 所以，为了荣耀上帝，你们要彼此接纳，就像基督接纳你们一样。

ton.text: This grizzly bear weighs half a ton.

berry.text: Acai is a berry that comes from the state of Pará, Brazil.
berry.translation: 阿薩伊是一種產自巴西帕拉州的漿果。

advantageous.text: Being able to use a computer is advantageous.

discreet.text: Mary told me that she thought Tom would be discreet.
discreet.translation: 瑪麗跟我說他覺得湯姆很謹慎。

camper.text: Tom bought an old ambulance and converted it into a camper.
camper.translation: 湯姆買了一輛舊救護車，並把它改裝成露營車。

interference.text: I won't allow you to continue your interference in my daughter's life.
interference.translation: 我不允许你继续干涉我女儿的生活。

bury.text: You can only bury these deeply in your heart.
bury.translation: 只能把這些深深地埋在心裏。

profit.text: He is making use of the collective's name for his own profit.
profit.translation: 他在利用集體的名義，為自己謀利。

costume.text: Sami was the only one who could fit into the costume.

creation.text: Love is what gives joy to all creation.
creation.translation: 爱把喜悦带给所有的生命。

blip.text: It's just a blip on a screen.

maneuver.text: Do you know the Heimlich maneuver?

cooperate.text: We are working hard to cooperate more.

violet.text: This flower is violet in color.

pollinate.text: Bees pollinate flowers and trees, and collect nectar to make honey, bee glue and bee venom.
pollinate.translation: 蜜蜂為花卉和樹木授粉，並採集花蜜來製造蜂蜜、蜂膠和蜂毒。

rigorous.text: As I've already mentioned before, after a rigorous investigation, we have found nothing wrong with our company's management.
rigorous.translation: 正如我之前提到的，经过严格的调查后，我们发现公司的管理层没有任何问题。

galaxy.text: Astronomers have discovered a galaxy that has almost no dark matter.
galaxy.translation: 天文學家們發現了一個幾乎沒有暗物質的星系。

crab.text: The first person who ate crab must also have tried to eat a spider.

sprinkle.text: I'll sauté a few sweet potatoes and sprinkle them with sugar.
sprinkle.translation: 我去炸一點紅薯，然後在上面撒上糖。

mushroom.text: I especially like the flavour of the mushroom.
mushroom.translation: 我特別喜歡蘑菇的味道。

solidarity.text: What can we do to strengthen the movement of solidarity with the Palestinian people?

trucks.text: The state will build specially made bridges so that koalas and other wildlife can cross roads while avoiding cars and trucks.

manipulate.text: Some teachers instinctively know how to play “favorites” to manipulate the other students.

flask.text: He took a swig from his flask.

rob.text: Tom and his friends planned to rob a bank.

labour.text: I'm unable to do manual labour.

brisk.text: Sales were brisk during the holiday season but have dropped off since.
brisk.translation: 假期期間銷售業績暢旺，但之後就下滑了。

warmth.text: He was bathed in the warmth of the kind light.
warmth.translation: 亲切的灯光让他的身上充满了温暖的感觉。

recreation.text: People who cannot find time for recreation are obliged sooner or later to find time for illness.
recreation.translation: 没工夫休息的人，早晚会有工夫生病的。

spark.text: A spark caused the gunpowder to explode.

females.text: Why are there differences between males and females?

conversion.text: Sami's conversion to Islam was a life-changing thing.

porch.text: Three men are waiting for you on the porch.
porch.translation: 三个男人在门廊上在等你。

retail.text: Organic kale is hand picked, washed and packed on site at Sprouting Farms, West Virginia, for retail and wholesale.
retail.translation: 有機羽衣甘藍在西維吉尼亞州的 Sprouting Farms 現場手工採摘、清洗和包裝，提供零售和批發。

virginia.text: Organic kale is hand picked, washed and packed on site at Sprouting Farms, West Virginia, for retail and wholesale.
virginia.translation: 有機羽衣甘藍在西維吉尼亞州的 Sprouting Farms 現場手工採摘、清洗和包裝，提供零售和批發。

chapel.text: Tessa shared her experience in a chapel assembly this April.
chapel.translation: 今年四月，苔絲在教會集會上分享了她的經驗。

testimony.text: In Islam, the shahada is the testimony of faith.
testimony.translation: 萨哈达在伊斯兰教是信仰的证明。

hue.text: As it oxidizes, the color turns blue and finally becomes a brilliant reddish-purple hue.

devices.text: Microsoft recently unveiled two new dual screen devices.

misleading.translation: 这是一个误导性的标题。

infection.text: He had an infection in his belly button.

competitor.text: She's a tough competitor, isn't she?
competitor.translation: 她是強大的對手，不是嗎？

deteriorate.text: If Tom doesn't take the prescribed medicine, his state of health might deteriorate.

bureaucracy.text: Algeria needs to get rid of its bureaucracy.

mediterranean.translation: 阿爾及利亞應該成為中國在地中海地區的主要投資熱點。

scorching.translation: 在炎热的天气里，猫咪没精神地摊在地上。

sites.text: Tom got a computer virus while he was watching videos on dubious Internet sites.

proper.text: Bicycles wear out, of course, but with proper care they may be made to last a long time.

primarily.translation: 如果全球化无法避免，应该首先为人服务而不是跨国公司的利益。

transform.translation: 同志们，让我们转换莫斯科为理想的共产主义城市。

reel.text: The films shown in this modest cinema had an intermission during which the projectionist changed the reel.
reel.translation: 這座規模不大的電影院在放映影片時會有一段中場休息，期間放映師負責換片。

session.text: Are you taking tests on the next session?

explore.text: I want to explore the world. It’s my dream.
explore.translation: 我想要去探索世界。那是我的夢想。

plush.text: The plush fur of the toy felt so soft and somehow soothing.
plush.translation: 那個玩具絨毛摸起來很柔軟，讓人感到舒適。

aircraft.text: China has the means to destroy your aircraft carriers.

carriers.text: China has the means to destroy your aircraft carriers.

hospitable.text: The Algerians are a hospitable people.
hospitable.translation: 阿爾及利亞人是好客的族群。

publish.text: He has written a book, however, he has no money to publish it.

immense.text: The teachers are all continuing to teach despite the immense pressure.
immense.translation: 老師們都頂著巨大的壓力在堅持上課。

rim.text: Mary took an egg and cracked it open on the rim of the bowl.
rim.translation: 瑪麗婭拿了一個雞蛋，並將它在碗沿上敲開。

projector.translation: 這個投影儀怎麼了？什麼都放不出來。

furry.text: In the furry fandom, many are artists of some sort.
furry.translation: 在福瑞圈子里，不少人都会进行一些创作。

considerations.text: None of these considerations are decisive.
considerations.translation: 这些考虑没有一项是决定性的。

decisive.text: None of these considerations are decisive.
decisive.translation: 这些考虑没有一项是决定性的。

spouse.text: Tom found a wonderful spouse in Mary.
spouse.translation: 湯姆認識了瑪莉這麼個好老婆。

interact.text: You should interact with the local culture more, to better understand some traditions.
interact.translation: 你应该多接触本文化，多了解一些传统习俗。

fluid.text: My correction fluid has run out, so now I only write in pencil.
fluid.translation: 我的涂改液用完了，现在写字只用铅笔。

correction.text: My correction fluid has run out, so now I only write in pencil.
correction.translation: 我的涂改液用完了，现在写字只用铅笔。

discourage.text: I didn't mean to discourage you.

illiterate.text: He was an orphan and illiterate.
illiterate.translation: 他是个孤儿，而且不识字。

alexander.text: Alexander the Great died in Babylon.
alexander.translation: 亞歷山大大帝死在巴比倫。

condemn.text: It is important to condemn racism, but that alone is not enough.
condemn.translation: 譴責種族主義很重要，但光是譴責種族主義是不夠的。

etiquette.translation: 几近失传的中华礼仪用语。

grin.text: We just have to grin and bear it.

idiom.text: "Having a clear conscience" is an idiom.

affecting.text: Yanni's dark mood was affecting the whole family.
affecting.translation: 雅尼的低落情緒影響了整個家庭。

batch.text: The third batch of vaccines provided by China to Colombia has arrived in Bogota, the capital of Colombia.
batch.translation: 中国向哥伦比亚提供的第三批疫苗运抵哥伦比亚首都波哥大。

jersey.text: Which Houston Rockets jersey looks the nicest?

predecessor.text: Floppy disks are the predecessor of hard disks.

proposition.text: An interesting proposition is raised in your book.
proposition.translation: 你书中提出了个有意思的命题。

compound.text: Do you know what compound words are?
compound.translation: 你知道什么是复合词吗？

straightforward.text: People who can express their thoughts in a clear-cut way are very straightforward.
straightforward.translation: 能够直截了当地表达自己想法的人很直爽。

refined.text: The cat glided along, very refined, but ended up falling, which was very embarrassing.
refined.translation: 這隻貓咪氣場全開，走著貓步，相當優雅，然後摔倒了，真是糗大了。

removal.text: Early removal of the placenta is very dangerous.

fable.text: "Drawing dragons and dotting in the eyes" is a fable.
fable.translation: 画龙点睛是一则寓言故事。

externally.text: This kind of medicine can only be applied externally.

neurologist.text: Yanni is an Algerian certified neurologist.
neurologist.translation: 雅尼是阿爾及利亞認證神經病學家。

hence.text: Hence, we have to take care of ourselves.
hence.translation: 因此，我们必须自己照顾自己。

intact.text: You can write a sentence in a lot of ways and still keep the general message intact.
intact.translation: 同一个含义可以用很多不同方式写的句子来表示。

congested.translation: 阿爾及爾的街道越來越堵塞了。

strategic.text: This project offers strategic advantages for Algeria.
strategic.translation: 這項專案給阿爾及利亞帶來策略性優勢。

legislative.text: In Algeria, thousands of people are running for the June 2021 legislative elections.
legislative.translation: 在阿爾及利亞，數千人正在競選 2021 年 6 月的立法選舉。

kernel.text: Tom tried to crack a walnut without damaging its kernel.
kernel.translation: 湯姆試圖敲碎一顆核桃而不損壞果仁。

debris.text: A cloud of dust and debris rose and lingered in the sky for a few minutes afterward.
debris.translation: 一團塵土與瓦礫騰空而起，在空中盤旋了數分鐘。

gorge.text: The gorge looked very deep to him.

harsh.text: I am slowly adjusting to the harsh climate here.
harsh.translation: 我在慢慢习惯这苛刻的气候。

exempt.text: Nothing is exempt from Murphy's Law.
exempt.translation: 沒有任何事物能逃脫墨菲定律。

inevitably.text: In addition, coincidences inevitably come in threes.
inevitably.translation: 不但如此，巧合的事还会接二连三地发生。

sustained.text: Tom sustained serious burns and had to go to the hospital.
sustained.translation: 湯姆嚴重燒傷，不得不去醫院治療。

potassium.text: Potassium, heated with a Bunsen burner, gives the flame a lilac color.
potassium.translation: 用本生燈加熱鉀，火焰就會呈現淡紫色。

fireman.text: “Mum, what’s a fireman?” “It’s like someone who does the watering of a building.”
fireman.translation: 「媽，消防員是幹什麼的？」「大概就是給房屋澆水的人。」

hound.text: What beast dost thou think thou art? Art thou a hound or a rat?
hound.translation: 你認為你是什麼野獸？獵犬還是老鼠？

metre.text: String is sold by the metre.

plague.text: She avoided him like the plague.
plague.translation: 她像躲避疾病一樣躲開了他。

porridge.text: There is a saying: cabbage soup and porridge are our food.
porridge.translation: 俗話說：高麗菜湯和粥是我們的食物。

abode.translation: 「喜馬拉雅」的意思是「雪之居所」。

purely.text: To claim sex is binary requires ignoring intersex people, which is unscientific and purely ideological.
purely.translation: 若要聲稱性別是二元的，就需要忽視陰陽人，這是不科學的，且純粹屬於意識形態問題。

ditch.text: Tom was driving too fast on the bend and ended up in the ditch.
ditch.translation: 湯姆拐彎兒拐得太快了，把車开到了水溝裏。

kennel.text: Why is the cat in the dog's kennel?

reception.text: Reception in the cellar is very poor.

rectangle.text: Roll the pastry into a rectangle.

cheque.text: I haven't got any cash. Can I write a cheque?
cheque.translation: 我沒現金，寫張支票可以嗎？

toil.text: While the rest of us toil, the robber barons eat from gilt tableware.
toil.translation: 當我們其他人辛苦工作時，強盜貴族卻用鍍金餐具吃飯。

herbal.text: I returned to bed with herbal tea and a piece of cake.
herbal.translation: 我回到床上，喝了杯花草茶，吃了一塊蛋糕。

prohibit.text: Who would prohibit such a thing?
prohibit.translation: 谁会禁止这样的事情呢？

arcade.text: Real-time strategy games usually include arcade elements.
arcade.translation: 即時策略遊戲通常會融入街機元素。

vaccine.text: I haven't had the vaccine for Coronavirus.
vaccine.translation: 我没有接种过冠状病毒疫苗。

flip.text: Unable to find a spatula, Tom used tongs to flip the pancakes.
flip.translation: 湯姆找不到鍋鏟了，只好用夾子為煎餅翻面。

depletion.text: The best refutation of the imaginary Malthusian laws of "land depletion" is the practice of Soviet collective farming.
depletion.translation: 對馬爾薩斯虛構的「土地耗盡」定律最有力的反駁，是蘇聯集體農場的時間。

brutal.text: "Tom chopped up the manuscript like it was iceberg lettuce." "Sounds brutal." "It was, but it was also necessary."
brutal.translation: 「湯姆像切捲心萵苣一樣，把手稿切碎了。」「聽起來很殘忍。」「沒錯，而且也沒有那個必要。」

iceberg.text: "Tom chopped up the manuscript like it was iceberg lettuce." "Sounds brutal." "It was, but it was also necessary."
iceberg.translation: 「湯姆像切捲心萵苣一樣，把手稿切碎了。」「聽起來很殘忍。」「沒錯，而且也沒有那個必要。」

reporting.text: All the newspapers were reporting on it.
reporting.translation: 所有報紙都在報導這件事。

tub.text: Since it's my day off today, I'm going to treat myself to a family-sized tub of walnut ice cream.
tub.translation: 今天是我的休息日，我要買一整桶家庭裝的核桃冰淇淋犒勞自己。

receiving.text: Intersex children are the only children receiving gender reassignment surgery, and the right supports it in their case, unlike the left.
receiving.translation: 陰陽人兒童是唯一接受變性手術的兒童。與左派不同，右派支持他們接受手術。

texture.text: Line art emphasizes form and outline, over color, shading, and texture.
texture.translation: 線條藝術強調形式和輪廓，而不是顏色、陰影和紋理。

outline.text: Line art emphasizes form and outline, over color, shading, and texture.
outline.translation: 線條藝術強調形式和輪廓，而不是顏色、陰影和紋理。

verbal.text: I don't need your verbal gentleness.
verbal.translation: 我不需要你口頭上的溫柔。

structures.text: Mangroves absorb more carbon dioxide than any other trees on Earth because they have large underground root structures.
structures.translation: 红树林吸取二氧化碳比地球上其他树木都要多，因为它们具有很大的地下根部结构。

partially.text: The London to Amsterdam flight was partially powered with a mixture of coconut and babassu nut oil.
partially.translation: 倫敦飛往阿姆斯特丹的航班部分動力來自椰子油和巴巴蘇堅果油的混合物。

summon.text: He gained the power to summon ghost trains.
summon.translation: 他獲得了召喚幽靈列車的能力。

el.text: "El Chavo del 8" is a Mexican series transmitted in Brazil by the Brazilian Television System (BTS).
el.translation: 《查沃德爾奧喬》是一部墨西哥電視劇，由巴西電視系統 (BTS) 在巴西播出。

amid.text: There's a fear that the snow will strengthen amid the strong winter pressure pattern.
amid.translation: 人們擔心在強勁的冬季氣壓模式下，降雪量會增加。

eighteenth.text: My home is on the eighteenth floor, and both the master bedroom and the living room face south.
eighteenth.translation: 我家在十八层，主卧和客厅都面朝南方。

bills.text: 26 percent of American Jews have difficulty paying bills; this includes 55 percent of those making under $50,000 per year.
bills.translation: 百分之二十六的美籍犹太裔人群难以支付生活费用；其中包括百分之五十五的年收入低于五万美元的人群。

ohio.text: I thought I traveled to Japan, but the locals kept telling me I was in Ohio.
ohio.translation: 我以为自己到了日本，但是当地人都说我在俄亥俄。

tactic.text: Elon Musk embodies the conservative propaganda tactic of calling everyone who crosses you a pedophile.
tactic.translation: 伊隆馬斯克將「凡是與你作對的人都是戀童癖」這一保守派慣用的抹黑手法發揮得淋漓盡致。

mothers.text: Life is not easy for working mothers.
mothers.translation: 生活对于那些有工作的母亲来说并不简单。

fortnight.text: We want to go to the Alps for a fortnight.
fortnight.translation: 我們想去阿爾卑斯山待兩週。

fingernail.text: Ziri uses his fingernail to peel loquats.

sneak.text: David decided to sneak into the kitchen and find something delicious to eat.
sneak.translation: 大衛決定偷偷溜進廚房，找點好吃的吃。

grown-up.translation: 詹姆斯差不多该成年了。

brick.text: Put your hard hat on. You might well get a brick fall on your head here.
brick.translation: 把安全帽戴上。這裡很可能會有磚塊砸到你頭上。

ing.text: When sautéing vegetables, it is important to use a non-stick pan.
ing.translation: 炒蔬菜時，重要的是使用不沾鍋。

carve.text: Most bans on gender-affirming care explicitly carve out exceptions for the only actual child genital mutilation going on, that against intersex babies.
carve.translation: 大多數針對性別肯定照護的禁令都針對陰陽人嬰兒明確規定了唯一豁免，允許他們接受真正的兒童生殖器切割。

psychiatry.text: Bruno is board certified in psychiatry.
psychiatry.translation: 布魯諾是委員會認證的精神科專家。

stalk.text: Thoreau coveted the plant's strong purple stalk for a cane, and the robins eat its dark crimson-juiced berries.
stalk.translation: 梭羅垂涎於這種植物強壯的紫色莖稈，將其製成藤條，而知更鳥則以深紅色汁液的漿果為食。

empirical.text: In its more extreme variants, cis ideology can include denial of the empirical reality of intersex and transgender people.
empirical.translation: 在更極端的變體中，順性別意識形態可能包括否認陰陽人和跨性別者的現實經歷。

denial.text: In its more extreme variants, cis ideology can include denial of the empirical reality of intersex and transgender people.
denial.translation: 在更極端的變體中，順性別意識形態可能包括否認陰陽人和跨性別者的現實經歷。

mob.text: The mob put a price on Tom's head.

whereas.text: Mary is a very promising student, whereas Tom promises much but achieves little.
whereas.translation: 瑪麗是個很有前途的學生，而湯姆則是光說不練。

vehicle.text: Edmundo threw Rima off the vehicle.
vehicle.translation: 埃德蒙多把里瑪從車上推下去了。

sector.text: Algeria needs to train its public sector employees on new technologies, communication skills, and customer service.
sector.translation: 阿爾及利亞需要對其公共部門員工進行新技術、溝通技巧和客服方面的培訓。

technologies.text: Algeria needs to train its public sector employees on new technologies, communication skills, and customer service.
technologies.translation: 阿爾及利亞需要對其公共部門員工進行新技術、溝通技巧和客服方面的培訓。

respectively.text: The two boys, aged respectively fourteen and sixteen, were dressed in the army uniform, and wore gold-lace sergeant's chevrons upon their sleeves.
respectively.translation: 这两个男孩，一个14岁、一个16岁，都穿着军队制服，衣袖上佩戴着镶金色蕾丝边的中士袖章。

wave.text: A cold wave of fear hit me like a brick.
wave.translation: 一陣寒意像磚頭一樣擊中了我。

irresistible.translation: 你這身穿著讓人無法抗拒。

seed.text: I ordered a sesame seed buns for the veggie burgers.
seed.translation: 我點了一份芝麻麵包，用來製作素食漢堡。

startle.text: Avoid sudden movements around the rabbit, they can startle them.
startle.translation: 避免在兔子旁邊突然做出動作，以免嚇到牠們。

choir.text: Are you still in the choir?

odor.text: The attic was a long, low-ceilinged room, dark and fragrant with the odor of the cedar.
odor.translation: 閣樓是一個狹長的低矮房間，光線昏暗，瀰漫著雪松的香氣。

churches.text: There are two churches in this street.

scratch.text: Have I got to do it from scratch?

robust.text: Full oxidation gives black tea its deep, robust flavor and dark amber color.
robust.translation: 充分氧化反應賦予紅茶濃鬱醇厚的風味和深琥珀色。

lime.text: Crafting a perfect Mojito can be a challenge. Achieving the right balance of sweetness, mintiness, and lime is an art.
lime.translation: 調製一杯完美的 Mojito 並非易事。要達到甜味、薄荷味和青檸味之間的完美平衡，是一門藝術。

achieving.text: Crafting a perfect Mojito can be a challenge. Achieving the right balance of sweetness, mintiness, and lime is an art.
achieving.translation: 調製一杯完美的 Mojito 並非易事。要達到甜味、薄荷味和青檸味之間的完美平衡，是一門藝術。

edifice.text: Thousands of laborers and craftsmen toiled for 22 years to craft the stunning white marble edifice.
edifice.translation: 數千名工人和工匠辛勤工作了 22 年，才打造出這座令人驚嘆的白色大理石建築。

marble.text: Thousands of laborers and craftsmen toiled for 22 years to craft the stunning white marble edifice.
marble.translation: 數千名工人和工匠辛勤工作了 22 年，才打造出這座令人驚嘆的白色大理石建築。

attract.translation: 黑色星期五促銷活動吸引了許多購物者。

commercial.text: The economist and statistician based in Ivory Coast says commercial trade in the region is primarily conducted with France.
commercial.translation: 這位常駐科特迪瓦的經濟學家兼統計學家表示，該地區的商業貿易主要與法國進行。

ivory.text: The economist and statistician based in Ivory Coast says commercial trade in the region is primarily conducted with France.
ivory.translation: 這位常駐科特迪瓦的經濟學家兼統計學家表示，該地區的商業貿易主要與法國進行。

dictate.text: Gender norms should not dictate how individuals cope with and process their emotions.
dictate.translation: 性別規範不應該規定個人如何面對或處理自己的情緒。

disgust.text: I didn't mean to disgust anyone.

crop.text: Without bee pollination, California's almond crop, for example, would be non-existent.
crop.translation: 例如，如果沒有蜜蜂授粉，加州的杏仁作物就不會存在。

transition.text: The transition from hardware to software happened gradually.
transition.translation: 由硬體到軟體的轉變是緩慢的。

diverse.text: It's fertile land inhabited by diverse nations.
diverse.translation: 這是一片肥沃的土地，居住著不同的民族。

impending.text: Agitated activity by certain animals may be a sign of an impending earthquake.
impending.translation: 某些动物烦躁不安, 可能是地震临震前的预兆。

willow.text: The willow branches swayed gently in the breeze.
willow.translation: 柳枝在微风中轻轻荡悠。

exploit.text: The capitalists tend to exploit the working people.
exploit.translation: 资本家倾向于压榨工人。

thermal.text: The atomic reactor generates enormous amounts of thermal energy.
thermal.translation: 原子反应堆发出大量的热能。

reactor.text: The atomic reactor generates enormous amounts of thermal energy.
reactor.translation: 原子反应堆发出大量的热能。

prosperous.text: The city is becoming more and more prosperous.
prosperous.translation: 这个城市越来越繁盛了。

perpetual.text: The idea of perpetual motion is an absurd hypothesis.
perpetual.translation: 永动机这个概念是个荒唐的假说。

affluent.text: Humanity is now affluent due to progression in science and technology.
affluent.translation: 由于科学技术的进步，人类现在很富裕。

sip.text: He savored a sip of coffee.
sip.translation: 他細細地品了一口咖啡。

thrift.text: I took it to the thrift shop.

fierce.text: No matter how fierce the winds blow or the waves crash, it feels as effortless as strolling leisurely in a quiet courtyard.
fierce.translation: 不管风吹浪打，胜似闲庭信步。

hip.translation: 他做了髖部超音波檢查。

fulfill.text: Do we all have a destiny to fulfill?
fulfill.translation: 我們都有要實現的命運嗎？

cyberspace.translation: 現在沒有人說「網際空間」了。

drag.text: The stage charisma of drag performers compels audiences to reconsider their own stereotypes.
drag.translation: 反串秀者的舞台魅力使觀眾不禁重新審視自己的刻板印象。

infectious.translation: 汤姆的笑声很有感染力。

exploration.text: I like how WHAT THE CAR? combines racing with fun puzzle gameplay and exploration.
exploration.translation: 我喜歡《WHAT THE CAR?》將賽車與有趣的益智遊戲和探索相結合。

review.text: I'll keep the meeting notes to review them before the next session.
review.translation: 我會記會議筆記，下次會議前可以回顧一下。

bully.text: The bully stomped on his schoolmate’s lunchbox out of spite.
bully.translation: 惡霸惡劣地踐踏同學的午餐便當。

puddle.text: Angrily, he stomped on the puddle, splashing mud everywhere.
puddle.translation: 他憤怒地踐踏水坑，弄得泥水四濺。

trail.text: The frustrated artist stomped on his failed painting, leaving a trail of shattered colors.
trail.translation: 畫家失望地踐踏失敗之作，留下一片混亂的色彩。

gaze.text: I felt her gaze from behind.

category.text: A special feature of verbs in the Russian language is the presence of the category of aspect.
category.translation: 俄語動詞的一個特徵是存在體的範疇。

descriptive.text: In Korean, adjectives often function as descriptive verbs, meaning they can be conjugated like verbs to express different tenses and moods.
descriptive.translation: 在韓語中，形容詞通常充當描述性動詞，這意味著它們可以像動詞一樣變位以表達不同的時態和語氣。

storage.text: My phone needs to have enough storage for my apps.
storage.translation: 我的手機需要足夠存儲空間來下載 App。

priority.text: Camera quality is a top priority for me.
priority.translation: 相機品質是我的優先考量。

landmark.text: A historical landmark has been restored and will reopen.
landmark.translation: 一座歷史地標已經修復並將重新開放。

engage.text: This app attracts over 10,000 users each day who engage with its features.
engage.translation: 這個應用程式每日吸引超過一萬位使用者使用其功能。

obsession.text: Julia Davis, a Russian media commentator, describes Victory Mania as “an unhealthy obsession with military might and past victories.”
obsession.translation: 俄羅斯媒體評論員朱莉婭戴維斯將勝利狂熱描述為「對軍事實力和舊有勝利的不健康的痴迷」。

mania.text: Julia Davis, a Russian media commentator, describes Victory Mania as “an unhealthy obsession with military might and past victories.”
mania.translation: 俄羅斯媒體評論員朱莉婭戴維斯將勝利狂熱描述為「對軍事實力和舊有勝利的不健康的痴迷」。

navigate.text: My goal is to help him navigate this stage of life.
navigate.translation: 我的目的是幫助他審視這段人生。

aspire.text: Confidence and courage are not exclusively masculine traits—they are values that everyone can aspire to.
aspire.translation: 自信與勇氣不僅是男性特質，也可以是所有人都能追求的價值。

exclusively.text: Confidence and courage are not exclusively masculine traits—they are values that everyone can aspire to.
exclusively.translation: 自信與勇氣不僅是男性特質，也可以是所有人都能追求的價值。

mundane.text: Sadako realized that, near death, even what was once mundane glows with an everlasting beauty.
mundane.translation: 貞子意識到，在生命將盡之際，曾經平凡無奇的事物，也會散發永恆的美。

critic.text: This famous mountain climber is a critic of mass tourism.
critic.translation: 這位著名的登山家批評大眾旅遊。

irony.text: Writer Luiz Fernando Veríssimo, a columnist capable of uniting generations of readers with irony, precision and sensitivity, died in Porto Alegre, Brazil.
irony.translation: 作家路易斯・費爾南多・沃瑞西莫在巴西阿雷格里港去世，他是位專欄作家，能以諷刺、精確、敏感的文筆團結幾代讀者。

generations.text: Writer Luiz Fernando Veríssimo, a columnist capable of uniting generations of readers with irony, precision and sensitivity, died in Porto Alegre, Brazil.
generations.translation: 作家路易斯・費爾南多・沃瑞西莫在巴西阿雷格里港去世，他是位專欄作家，能以諷刺、精確、敏感的文筆團結幾代讀者。

sensitivity.text: Writer Luiz Fernando Veríssimo, a columnist capable of uniting generations of readers with irony, precision and sensitivity, died in Porto Alegre, Brazil.
sensitivity.translation: 作家路易斯・費爾南多・沃瑞西莫在巴西阿雷格里港去世，他是位專欄作家，能以諷刺、精確、敏感的文筆團結幾代讀者。

merge.text: Get into the left lane to make room for the guy who's trying to merge.
merge.translation: 移到左線，為想併入的那輛車騰出空間。

premise.text: What's the premise of the TV show "The Bachelor"?
premise.translation: 《單身漢》這個電視節目的基本設定是什麼？

simulation.text: Build your own championship team in a new football management simulation game, launching in early November.
simulation.translation: 全新足球經理模擬遊戲將於 11 月初推出，邀你打造屬於自己的冠軍球隊。

tension.text: Every transfer window is a test of judgment and patience, and every match brings its own surprises and tension.
tension.translation: 每一次轉會談判都是對眼光與耐性的考驗，每一個比賽日都充滿未知的挑戰與壓力。

subscription.text: The subscription service is available for a fixed monthly fee with a one-month free trial.
subscription.translation: 此訂閱服務的月費為固定金額，並提供免費試用一個月。

supporting.text: Subscribers can play across phones, tablets, and computers, with certain games supporting multiplayer access and cloud sync.
supporting.translation: 訂閱後可跨越手機、平板與電腦等裝置遊玩，部分遊戲支援多人共享與雲端同步功能。

availability.text: Availability may vary by region and device compatibility.
availability.translation: 實際提供內容可能因地區與裝置相容性而異。

titles.text: Then they displayed all the book titles publicly and banned their sale forever.
titles.translation: 然後又把各書名揭示通衢，永遠禁止販賣。

flexibility.text: Now is the critical moment. Please stop being so stubborn and inflexible, completely unable to adapt flexibility.
flexibility.translation: 現在正是關鍵的時候了，請不要還那麼死腦筋，絲毫不知權變。

ex.text: Po-lin ran into his ex at the night market yesterday. It was super awkward.
ex.translation: 柏霖昨天在夜市遇到前女友，尷尬到不行。

manifest.text: Spirits of Heaven and Earth, heed my call; manifest swiftly by divine decree!
manifest.translation: 天靈靈，地靈靈；急急如律令！

concentration.text: Housing prices in Hsinchu City have risen sharply due to the concentration of the tech industry.
concentration.translation: 新竹市區的房價因為科技產業聚集而水漲船高。

grove.text: In spring, the bamboo grove outside Hsinchu City is especially green.
grove.translation: 春天的時候，新竹城外的竹林特別翠綠。

greasy.text: I bought a handmade dried persimmon in Hsinchu. It tastes sweet but not greasy.
greasy.translation: 我在新竹買了一塊手工柿餅，味道甜而不膩。

specifically.text: The first time he came to Taipei, he specifically wanted to go shopping in Ximending.
specifically.translation: 他第一次來台北，就指名要去西門町逛街。

vile.text: Guards! Slap that vile woman's face!
vile.translation: 來人，給我掌這賤女人嘴巴！

statements.text: "Only a moron truly believes in blanket statements like this." "That's actually a blanket statement too." "Ha, I know."
statements.translation: 「只有傻子才會相信這種一概而論的說法。」「你這句話其實也是一種一概而論的說法。」「唉，我知道啦。」

notable.text: The trigonometric functions satisfy a wide array of notable algebraic identities.
notable.translation: 三角函數滿足各種代數恆等式。

z.text: This formula is valid for all complex numbers z with a real part greater than zero.
z.translation: 此公式對所有實部大於零的複數 z 均成立。

domain.text: A holomorphic function can be expressed as a convergent power series in a neighborhood of any point in its domain.
domain.translation: 全純函數在其定義域內任意一點的鄰域中都可以表示為收斂的冪級數。

integral.text: The integral and the antiderivative are defined in two different ways, and the Fundamental Theorem of Calculus states the relationship between them.
integral.translation: 積分與反導函數是以兩種不同的方式定義的，而微積分基本定理闡述了兩者之間的關係。

subsidize.text: The city should subsidize small businesses in industries with large overhead costs.
subsidize.translation: 市府應補貼經常性開支龐大的產業中的小型企業。

alumnus.text: I'm not sure if you remember me, but I'm an alumnus who took a couple of your classes during my senior year.
alumnus.translation: 不知道您是否還記得我，我是曾在大四修過您幾門課的校友。

boulder.text: The crevice in the boulder on the ocean floor conceals an octopus.
boulder.translation: 海底的岩石缝里藏着一只章鱼。

treatise.text: The military treatise authored by Sun Tzu is, to this day, required reading in military academies all across the world.
treatise.translation: 孫子所著的兵法，至今仍是各國軍事學院的必讀經典。

dictation.text: Have you finished your homework? Have you memorized the dictation content?
dictation.translation: 這次作業做完了嗎？默寫背了嗎？

sophisticated.text: A vast and sophisticated system is usually based on a few simple rules.
sophisticated.translation: 庞大而精妙的体系往往建立在几个简单的规则之上。

linger.text: There are rumors that some evil spirits linger around here.
linger.translation: 传闻这附近有些脏东西。

buzz.text: I'm getting a bit of a nicotine buzz.
